class="tocCollapsible_lP1m theme-doc-toc-mobile tocMobile_k7Dh"><button type="button" class="clean-btn tocCollapsibleButton_fC7B">On this page</button></div><div class="theme-doc-markdown markdown"><div class="row"><div class="col col--12 markdown"><header><h1>Networks</h1></header>
<p>Stellar has three networks: the public network (Mainnet, also called Pubnet or the Public Network), the test network (Testnet), and a dev network (Futurenet).</p>
<ul>
<li class=""><strong>Mainnet</strong> is the main network used by applications in production. It connects to real financial rails and requires XLM to cover minimum balances, transaction fees, and rent.</li>
<li class=""><strong>Testnet</strong> is a smaller, free-to-use network maintained by SDF that functions like Mainnet but doesn&#x27;t connect to real money. It resets on a regular cadence, making it the best place for developers to test applications in a stable environment that mirrors Mainnet functionality.</li>
<li class=""><strong>Futurenet</strong> is a dev network for testing bleeding-edge features. It resets whenever necessary, so it&#x27;s less predictable than Testnet, but it&#x27;s where new features are introduced before stable releases.</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_GmKl" id="network-comparison">Network Comparison<a href="#network-comparison" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Network Comparison" title="Direct link to Network Comparison" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<table><thead><tr><th>Feature</th><th>Mainnet</th><th>Testnet</th><th>Futurenet</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><strong>Purpose</strong></td><td>Production network</td><td>Stable testing environment</td><td>Bleeding-edge feature testing</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Network Passphrase</strong></td><td><code>Public Global Stellar Network ; September 2015</code></td><td><code>Test SDF Network ; September 2015</code></td><td><code>Test SDF Future Network ; October 2022</code></td></tr><tr><td><strong>Network ID</strong></td><td><code style="overflow-wrap:anywhere">7ac33997544e3175d266bd022439b22cdb16508c01163f26e5cb2a3e1045a979</code></td><td><code style="overflow-wrap:anywhere">cee0302d59844d32bdca915c8203dd44b33fbb7edc19051ea37abedf28ecd472</code></td><td><code style="overflow-wrap:anywhere">a3a1c6a78286713e29be0e9785670fa838d13917cd8eaeb4a3579ff1debc7fd5</code></td></tr><tr><td><strong>Validator Nodes</strong></td><td>Run by the public</td><td>SDF runs three core validator nodes</td><td>SDF runs core validator nodes</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Validator</strong></td><td><code>core-live-a.stellar.org</code> <code>core-live-b.stellar.org</code> <code>core-live-c.stellar.org</code></td><td><code>core-live-testnet.stellar.org</code></td><td><code>core-live-futurenet.stellar.org</code></td></tr><tr><td><strong>Funding</strong></td><td>Real XLM required from another account</td><td>Free via Friendbot</td><td>Free via Friendbot</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Horizon API</strong></td><td><a class="" href="/docs/data/apis/horizon/providers">Multiple providers available</a></td><td><a href="https://horizon-testnet.stellar.org" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">https://horizon-testnet.stellar.org</a></td><td><a href="https://horizon-futurenet.stellar.org" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">https://horizon-futurenet.stellar.org</a></td></tr><tr><td><strong>Stellar RPC</strong></td><td><a class="" href="/docs/data/apis/rpc/providers">Third-party providers only</a></td><td><code>https://soroban-testnet.stellar.org</code></td><td><code>https://rpc-futurenet.stellar.org</code></td></tr><tr><td><strong>Operations per Ledger</strong></td><td>1,000</td><td>100</td><td>100</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Smart Contract Transactions per Ledger</strong></td><td>Max 100*</td><td>1</td><td>1</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Network Resets</strong></td><td>Never</td><td>Regular cadence</td><td>As needed (unpredictable)</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Friendbot Available</strong></td><td>No</td><td>Yes (10,000 XLM)</td><td>Yes (10,000 XLM)</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Friendbot API</strong></td><td>N/A</td><td><code>https://friendbot.stellar.org</code></td><td><code>https://friendbot-futurenet.stellar.org</code></td></tr><tr><td><strong>History Archive</strong></td><td><code>http://history.stellar.org/prd/core-live/core_live_001/</code>, <code>http://history.stellar.org/prd/core-live/core_live_002/</code>, <code>http://history.stellar.org/prd/core-live/core_live_003/</code></td><td><code>http://history.stellar.org/prd/core-testnet/core_testnet_001</code>, <code>http://history.stellar.org/prd/core-testnet/core_testnet_002</code>, <code>http://history.stellar.org/prd/core-testnet/core_testnet_003</code> (<a href="https://github.com/stellar/stellar-core/blob/master/docs/stellar-core_testnet.cfg" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">more info</a>)</td><td><code>http://history.stellar.org/dev/core-futurenet/core_futurenet_001/</code>, <code>http://history.stellar.org/dev/core-futurenet/core_futurenet_002/</code>, <code>http://history.stellar.org/dev/core-futurenet/core_futurenet_003/</code></td></tr></tbody></table>
<p>*The precise amount can vary based on <a class="" href="/docs/learn/fundamentals/fees-resource-limits-metering#resource-limitations">resource limits</a>. See <a class="" href="/docs/learn/fundamentals/fees-resource-limits-metering">Fees and Metering</a> for detailed smart contract network settings.</p>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_GmKl" id="friendbot">Friendbot<a href="#friendbot" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Friendbot" title="Direct link to Friendbot" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>Friendbot is a bot that funds accounts and contracts with fake XLM on Testnet or Futurenet. You can request XLM from Friendbot using the <a class="" href="/docs/tools/lab/account#fund-account">Stellar Lab</a> or with various SDKs.</p>
<p><strong>Key details:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li class="">Requests are rate limited, so use wisely</li>
<li class="">Provides 10,000 fake XLM when funding a new account</li>
<li class="">Can fund both account addresses (G...) and contract addresses (C...)</li>
<li class="">For multiple accounts: fund your first account with Friendbot, then use that account to fund subsequent accounts using the Create Account operation</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_GmKl" id="getting-started">Getting Started<a href="#getting-started" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Getting Started" title="Direct link to Getting Started" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p><strong>For Production:</strong> Use Mainnet with real XLM and production-ready infrastructure.</p>
<p><strong>For Testing:</strong> Use Testnet for stable development and testing that mirrors production behavior.</p>
<p><strong>For Experimental Features:</strong> Use Futurenet to test the latest features before they&#x27;re released.</p>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_GmKl" id="testnet-and-futurenet-data-reset">Testnet and Futurenet data reset<a href="#testnet-and-futurenet-data-reset" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Testnet and Futurenet data reset" title="Direct link to Testnet and Futurenet data reset" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>Testnet and Futurenet are reset periodically to the genesis ledger to declutter the network, remove spam, reduce the time needed to catch up on the latest ledger, and help maintain the system. Resets clear all ledger entries (accounts, trustlines, offers, smart contract data, etc.), transactions, and historical data from Stellar Core, Horizon, and the Stellar RPC- which is why developers should not rely on the persistence of accounts or the state of any balances when using Testnet or Futurenet.</p>
<p>Futurenet resets are on a less regular cadence than Testnet resets and don&#x27;t have a set schedule.</p>
<p>Testnet resets typically happen 2-4 times per year at 17:00 UTC and are announced at least two weeks in advance on the <a href="https://dashboard.stellar.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">Stellar Dashboard</a> and through several developer community channels.</p>
<p>Here are the scheduled 2026 dates:</p>
<ul>
<li class="">December 16, 2026</li>
</ul>
<p>If you run a Testnet or Futurenet Horizon instance, you need to re-join and re-sync to the network after a reset. Check out how to do that here: <a href="https://github.com/stellar/packages/blob/master/docs/testnet-reset.md" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="">Testnet Reset</a>.</p>
<p>Check out <a class="" href="/docs/build/guides/basics/automate-reset-data">this How-To Guide</a> on automating Testnet and Futurenet reset data.</p>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_GmKl" id="test-data-automation">Test data automation<a href="#test-data-automation" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Test data automation" title="Direct link to Test data automation" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>It is recommended that you have testing infrastructure that can repopulate the Testnet and Futurenet with useful data after a reset. This will make testing more reliable and will help you scale your testing infrastructure to a private network if you choose to do so. For example, you may want to:</p>
<ul>
<li class="">Generate issuers of assets for testing the development of a wallet;</li>
<li class="">Generate orders on the order book (both current and historical) for testing the development of a trading client;</li>
<li class="">Recreate liquidity pools;</li>
<li class="">Redeploy smart contracts.</li>
</ul>
<p>If you maintain an application, you should think about creating a data set that is representative enough to test your primary use cases, and allow for robust testing even when Testnet or Futurenet are not available.</p>
<p>A script can automate this entire process by creating an account with Friendbot and submitting a set of transactions that are predefined as a part of your testing infrastructure.</p>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_GmKl" id="network-passphrases">Network passphrases<a href="#network-passphrases" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Network passphrases" title="Direct link to Network passphrases" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>Stellar’s Mainnet, Testnet, and Futurenet each have their own unique passphrase. These are used when validating signatures on a given transaction. If you sign a transaction for one network but submit it to another, it won’t be considered valid. By convention, the format of a passphrase is ‘<code>[Network Name] ; [Month of Creation] [Year of Creation]</code>’.</p>
<p>The passphrases for the Stellar Mainnet, Testnet, and Futurenet are:</p>
<ul>
<li class="">Mainnet: &#x27;<code>Public Global Stellar Network ; September 2015</code>&#x27;</li>
<li class="">Testnet: &#x27;<code>Test SDF Network ; September 2015</code>&#x27;</li>
<li class="">Futurenet: &#x27;<code>Test SDF Future Network ; October 2022</code>&#x27;</li>
</ul>
<p>Passphrases serve two main purposes: (1) used as the seed for the root account (master network key) at genesis and (2) used to build hashes of transactions, which are ultimately what is signed by each signer’s secret key in a transaction envelope; this allows you to verify that a transaction was intended for a specific network by its signers.</p>
<p>Many SDKs have the passphrases hardcoded for Stellar&#x27;s networks. If you’re running a private network, you’ll have to manually pass in a passphrase to be used whenever transaction hashes are generated. All of Stellar’s official SDKs allow you to use a network with a custom passphrase.</p>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_GmKl" id="network-ids">Network IDs<a href="#network-ids" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Network IDs" title="Direct link to Network IDs" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>Each Stellar network also has a network ID, which is the SHA-256 hash of the network passphrase. The network ID is used in transaction signing and contract address generation and ensures that hashes and IDs generated are different on each network.</p>
<p>The IDs for the Stellar Mainnet, Testnet, and Futurenet are:</p>
<table><thead><tr><th>Network</th><th>Network ID</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Mainnet</td><td><code>7ac33997544e3175d266bd022439b22cdb16508c01163f26e5cb2a3e1045a979</code></td></tr><tr><td>Testnet</td><td><code>cee0302d59844d32bdca915c8203dd44b33fbb7edc19051ea37abedf28ecd472</code></td></tr><tr><td>Futurenet</td><td><code>a3a1c6a78286713e29be0e9785670fa838d13917cd8eaeb4a3579ff1debc7fd5</code></td></tr></tbody></table>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_GmKl" id="what-testnet-and-futurenet-should-and-should-not-be-used-for">What Testnet and Futurenet should and should not be used for<a href="#what-testnet-and-futurenet-should-and-should-not-be-used-for" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to What Testnet and Futurenet should and should not be used for" title="Direct link to What Testnet and Futurenet should and should not be used for" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<h3 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_GmKl" id="testnet-and-futurenet-are-good-for">Testnet and Futurenet are good for<a href="#testnet-and-futurenet-are-good-for" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Testnet and Futurenet are good for" title="Direct link to Testnet and Futurenet are good for" translate="no">​</a></h3>
<ul>
<li class="">Creating test accounts (with funding from Friendbot);</li>
<li class="">Developing applications and contracts and exploring tutorials on Stellar without the potential to lose any assets;</li>
<li class="">Testing existing applications against new releases or release candidates of Stellar Core, Horizon, and the Stellar RPC;</li>
<li class="">Performing data analysis on a smaller, non-trivial data set compared to the Mainnet.</li>
</ul>
<h3 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_GmKl" id="testnet-and-futurenet-are-bad-for">Testnet and Futurenet are bad for<a href="#testnet-and-futurenet-are-bad-for" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Testnet and Futurenet are bad for" title="Direct link to Testnet and Futurenet are bad for" translate="no">​</a></h3>
<ul>
<li class="">Load and stress testing;</li>
<li class="">High availability test infrastructure- SDF does not guarantee Testnet availability;</li>
<li class="">Long-term storage of data on the network since the network resets periodically;</li>
<li class="">A testing infrastructure that requires more control over the test environment, such as:<!-- -->
<ul>
<li class="">The ability to control the data reset frequency;</li>
<li class="">The need to secure private or sensitive data (before launching on the Mainnet). You can always run your own test network for use cases that don’t work well with SDF’s Testnet.</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="anchor anchorTargetStickyNavbar_GmKl" id="moving-your-project-from-testnet-or-futurenet-to-production">Moving your project from Testnet or Futurenet to production<a href="#moving-your-project-from-testnet-or-futurenet-to-production" class="hash-link" aria-label="Direct link to Moving your project from Testnet or Futurenet to production" title="Direct link to Moving your project from Testnet or Futurenet to production" translate="no">​</a></h2>
<p>Mainnet, Testnet, and Futurenet each have their own unique passphrase, which is used to validate signatures on a given transaction.</p>
<p>See above sections for the network passphrase for each network.</p>
<p>For applications that don’t rely on the state of the network (such as specific accounts needing to exist), you move to production by changing the network passphrase and ensuring your Horizon instance is connected to Mainnet.</p>
<p>If you’ve been running a Stellar Core or Horizon instance against the Testnet and want to switch to production, changing the passphrase will require both respective databases to be completely reinitialized. If you run your own RPC on Testnet or Futurenet, you may want to use an RPC service when you move to Mainnet. Check out the RPC service providers <a class="" href="/docs/data/apis/rpc/providers">here</a>.</p></div></div></div><div class="row"><div class="col col--12"><footer class="theme-doc-footer     <meta name="description" content="PoolStellar - A privacy-preserving policy-enabled payments system for Stellar blockchain with zero-knowledge proofs.">
    <meta name="keywords" content="Stellar, privacy, blockchain, zero-knowledge proofs, payments, ZK, cryptocurrency, membership policy">
    <meta name="author" content="PoolStellar">
    <meta name="robots" content="index, follow">

    <title>PoolStellar - Private Payment System</title>

    <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://nethermindeth.github.io/stellar-private-payments/css/app.css" integrity="sha384-174QxizQXPyE1jr0Aup+osSennRD6fSotDi2fGaw26wZGop1VUM0upLYEgckoOhX"/>

    <!-- Fonts -->
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

    
<script type="module">
import init, * as bindings from 'https://nethermindeth.github.io/stellar-private-payments/js/web.js';
const wasm = await init({ module_or_path: 'https://nethermindeth.github.io/stellar-private-payments/js/web_bg.wasm' });


window.wasmBindings = bindings;


dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("TrunkApplicationStarted", {detail: {wasm}}));

</script>
    
    
    
<link rel="modulepreload" href="https://nethermindeth.github.io/stellar-private-payments/js/web.js" crossorigin="anonymous" integrity="sha384-93rhI92ViI6WIXAyGukz1WAJ3rJM6rMpbRA3hyQObsPp+7YsuYPGpv/52ZXxG038"><link rel="preload" href="https://nethermindeth.github.io/stellar-private-payments/js/web_bg.wasm" crossorigin="anonymous" integrity="sha384-F4Uiq+ANDkcgpe7/EDiskoq0VxlVG+bdZXxDNcqZw/AwhLhBDXt5edb1hn1PAifu" as="fetch" type="application/wasm"></head>
<body class="bg-dark-950 text-dark-50 font-sans min-h-screen antialiased">
    <!-- Skip to main content for accessibility -->
    <a href="#main-content" class="sr-only focus:not-sr-only focus:absolute focus:top-4 focus:left-4 bg-brand-500 text-dark-950 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-semibold z-50">
        Skip to main content
    </a>

    <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-4 sm:py-6 flex flex-col gap-4 sm:gap-6 min-h-screen">

        <!-- Header -->
        <header class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4 p-4 bg-dark-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-visible relative z-50" role="banner">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div class="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-brand-500 to-brand-600 rounded-lg shadow-lg shadow-brand-500/25" aria-hidden="true">
                    <svg class="w-6 h-6 text-dark-950" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                        <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/>
                        <path d="M12 6v12M8 10l4-4 4 4"/>
                        <circle cx="12" cy="15" r="2" fill="currentColor"/>
                    </svg>
                </div>
                <h1 class="text-lg sm:text-xl font-semibold">
                    PoolStellar <span class="text-dark-400 font-normal">Private Payment System</span>
                </h1>
            </div>
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3 overflow-visible">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-full text-sm text-dark-300">
                    <span class="w-2 h-2 bg-emerald-500 rounded-full animate-pulse-dot shadow-sm shadow-emerald-500" aria-hidden="true"></span>
                    <span id="network-name">Network</span>
                </div>
                <div class="relative overflow-visible" id="wallet-container">
                    <button
                        type="button"
                        id="wallet-btn"
                        class="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-dark-800 hover:bg-dark-700 border border-dark-700 hover:border-brand-500 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-dark-950"
                        aria-label="Connect wallet"
                        aria-haspopup="true"
                        aria-expanded="false"
                    >
                        <svg class="w-5 h-5" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true">
                            <rect x="2" y="6" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/>
                            <path d="M22 10h-4a2 2 0 0 0 0 4h4"/>
                            <circle cx="18" cy="12" r="1" fill="currentColor"/>
                            <path d="M6 6V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h8a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"/>
                        </svg>
                        <span id="wallet-text">Connect Freighter</span>
                        <svg id="wallet-dropdown-icon" class="w-4 h-4 hidden" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/>
                        </svg>
                    </button>

                    <!-- Wallet Dropdown Menu -->
                    <div
                        id="wallet-dropdown"
                        class="absolute top-full right-0 mt-2 w-56 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg shadow-xl z-[100] hidden"
                        role="menu"
                        aria-orientation="vertical"
                    >
                        <div class="p-2 border-b border-dark-700">
                            <p class="text-xs text-dark-500 px-2">Connected as</p>
                            <p id="wallet-dropdown-address" class="font-mono text-xs text-dark-300 px-2 truncate"></p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="p-1">
                            <button
                                type="button"
                                id="wallet-register-btn"
                                class="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-dark-300 hover:bg-dark-700 hover:text-brand-400 rounded transition-colors"
                                role="menuitem"
                            >
                                <svg class="w-4 h-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                    <path d="M15 3h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-4"/>
                                    <polyline points="10 17 15 12 10 7"/>
                                    <line x1="15" y1="12" x2="3" y2="12"/>
                                </svg>
                                Register Public Key
                            </button>
                            <button
                                type="button"
                                id="wallet-disconnect-btn"
                                class="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-dark-300 hover:bg-dark-700 hover:text-red-400 rounded transition-colors"
                                role="menuitem"
                            >
                                <svg class="w-4 h-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                    <path d="M9 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4"/>
                                    <polyline points="16 17 21 12 16 7"/>
                                    <line x1="21" y1="12" x2="9" y2="12"/>
                                </svg>
                                Disconnect
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </header>

        <!-- Main Content -->
        <main id="main-content" class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[1fr_320px] gap-4 sm:gap-6">

            <!-- Transaction Panel -->
            <section class="bg-dark-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden" aria-labelledby="transaction-heading">
                <h2 id="transaction-heading" class="sr-only">Transaction Controls</h2>

                <!-- Tab Navigation -->
                <nav class="flex p-1.5 gap-1 bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-800" role="tablist" aria-label="Transaction type">
                    <button
                        type="button"
                        role="tab"
                        id="tab-deposit"
                        aria-selected="true"
                        aria-controls="panel-deposit"
                        class="tab-btn flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-inset bg-dark-800 text-brand-500 border border-brand-500/30 shadow-lg shadow-brand-500/10"
                        data-tab="deposit"
                    >
                        <svg class="w-4 h-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path d="M12 3v18M5 10l7-7 7 7"/>
                        </svg>
                        Deposit
                    </button>
                    <button
                        type="button"
                        role="tab"
                        id="tab-withdraw"
                        aria-selected="false"
                        aria-controls="panel-withdraw"
                        class="tab-btn flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-inset text-dark-400 hover:text-dark-200 hover:bg-dark-800"
                        data-tab="withdraw"
                    >
                        <svg class="w-4 h-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path d="M12 21V3M5 14l7 7 7-7"/>
                        </svg>
                        Withdraw
                    </button>
                    <button
                        type="button"
                        role="tab"
                        id="tab-transfer"
                        aria-selected="false"
                        aria-controls="panel-transfer"
                        class="tab-btn flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-inset text-dark-400 hover:text-dark-200 hover:bg-dark-800"
                        data-tab="transfer"
                    >
                        <svg class="w-4 h-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path d="M17 7l-10 10M7 7h10v10"/>
                        </svg>
                        Transfer
                    </button>
                    <button
                        type="button"
                        role="tab"
                        id="tab-transact"
                        aria-selected="false"
                        aria-controls="panel-transact"
                        class="tab-btn flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-inset text-dark-400 hover:text-dark-200 hover:bg-dark-800"
                        data-tab="transact"
                    >
                        <svg class="w-4 h-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path d="M7 16V4M7 4L3 8M7 4l4 4"/>
                            <path d="M17 8v12m0 0l4-4m-4 4l-4-4"/>
                        </svg>
                        Transact
                        <span class="text-[10px] font-semibold px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-brand-500/20 text-brand-400 rounded uppercase tracking-wide">Advanced</span>
                    </button>
                </nav>

                <!-- Tab Panels -->
                <div class="p-4 sm:p-6">

                    <!-- Deposit Panel -->
                    <article
                        role="tabpanel"
                        id="panel-deposit"
                        aria-labelledby="tab-deposit"
                        class="tab-panel space-y-6"
                    >
                        <!-- Amount -->
                        <div>
                            <label for="deposit-amount" class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">
                                Amount to Deposit
                            </label>
                            <input
                                type="text"
                                id="deposit-amount"
                                placeholder="0.0"
                                inputmode="decimal"
                                class="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 placeholder:text-dark-600"
                                autocomplete="off"
                                spellcheck="false"
                            >
                        </div>

                        <label class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-dark-400 cursor-pointer select-none">
                            <input
                                type="checkbox"
                                id="deposit-advanced-mode"
                                class="rounded border-dark-600 bg-dark-800 text-brand-500 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-offset-dark-950"
                            >
                            Advanced (manual output split)
                        </label>

                        <div id="deposit-advanced-section" class="hidden space-y-4">
                        <!-- Balance Equation -->
                        <div id="deposit-balance" class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-2 p-3 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm" role="status" aria-live="polite">
                            <span class="font-mono px-2 py-1 bg-dark-700 rounded" data-eq="input">Deposit: 0</span>
                            <span class="text-dark-500">=</span>
                            <span class="font-mono px-2 py-1 bg-dark-700 rounded" data-eq="outputs">Outputs: 0</span>
                            <span class="ml-2" data-eq="status" aria-label="Equation balanced">
                                <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-500 hidden" data-icon="valid" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14"/><polyline points="22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01"/></svg>
                                <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-red-500 hidden" data-icon="invalid" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="15" y1="9" x2="9" y2="15"/><line x1="9" y1="9" x2="15" y2="15"/></svg>
                            </span>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Output Notes -->
                        <fieldset>
                            <legend class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">
                                Output Notes <span class="normal-case text-dark-500">(how to split your deposit)</span>
                            </legend>
                            <div id="deposit-outputs" class="space-y-2">
                                <!-- Output rows will be created from template -->
                            </div>
                        </fieldset>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Submit Button -->
                        <button
                            type="button"
                            id="btn-deposit"
                            class="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-500 to-brand-600 hover:from-brand-400 hover:to-brand-500 text-dark-950 font-semibold rounded-lg shadow-lg shadow-brand-500/25 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-dark-950 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
                        >
                            <span class="btn-text">Deposit</span>
                            <span class="btn-loading hidden"></span>
                        </button>
                        <p id="wallet-disclaimer-deposit" class="wallet-disclaimer text-center text-xs text-dark-500 mt-2">
                            Connect wallet to continue
                        </p>
                    </article>

                    <!-- Withdraw Panel -->
                    <article
                        role="tabpanel"
                        id="panel-withdraw"
                        aria-labelledby="tab-withdraw"
                        class="tab-panel hidden space-y-6"
                    >
                        <!-- Amount (planner selects notes automatically) -->
                        <div id="withdraw-amount-section">
                            <label for="withdraw-amount" class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">
                                Amount to Withdraw
                            </label>
                            <input
                                type="text"
                                id="withdraw-amount"
                                placeholder="0.0"
                                inputmode="decimal"
                                class="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 placeholder:text-dark-600"
                                autocomplete="off"
                                spellcheck="false"
                            >
                            <p id="withdraw-plan-hint" class="text-xs text-dark-500 mt-1 hidden" aria-live="polite"></p>
                        </div>

                        <label class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-dark-400 cursor-pointer select-none">
                            <input
                                type="checkbox"
                                id="withdraw-advanced-mode"
                                class="rounded border-dark-600 bg-dark-800 text-brand-500 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-offset-dark-950"
                            >
                            Advanced (manual note selection)
                        </label>

                        <!-- Input Notes (advanced) -->
                        <fieldset id="withdraw-advanced-section" class="hidden">
                            <legend class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">
                                Input Notes <span class="normal-case text-dark-500">(notes to spend)</span>
                            </legend>
                            <div id="withdraw-inputs" class="space-y-2">
                                <!-- Input rows will be created from template -->
                            </div>
                            <button type="button" id="withdraw-add-input" class="hidden mt-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-dark-400 hover:text-brand-400 border border-dashed border-dark-600 hover:border-brand-500 rounded-lg transition-colors flex items-center gap-1.5">
                                <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>
                                Add another note
                            </button>
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-center mt-3 p-3 bg-dark-800 rounded-lg">
                                <span class="text-sm text-dark-400">Total to withdraw:</span>
                                <span id="withdraw-total" class="font-mono text-lg font-semibold text-brand-400">0</span>
                            </div>
                        </fieldset>

                        <!-- Recipient Address -->
                        <div>
                            <label for="withdraw-recipient" class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">
                                Recipient Address
                            </label>
                            <input
                                type="text"
                                id="withdraw-recipient"
                                placeholder="G..."
                                class="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 placeholder:text-dark-600 placeholder:font-sans"
                                autocomplete="off"
                                spellcheck="false"
                            >
                        </div>

                        <!-- Submit Button -->
                        <button
                            type="button"
                            id="btn-withdraw"
                            class="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-500 to-brand-600 hover:from-brand-400 hover:to-brand-500 text-dark-950 font-semibold rounded-lg shadow-lg shadow-brand-500/25 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-dark-950 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
                        >
                            <span class="btn-text">Withdraw</span>
                            <span class="btn-loading hidden"></span>
                        </button>
                        <p id="wallet-disclaimer-withdraw" class="wallet-disclaimer text-center text-xs text-dark-500 mt-2">
                            Connect wallet to continue
                        </p>
                    </article>

                    <!-- Transfer Panel -->
                    <article
                        role="tabpanel"
                        id="panel-transfer"
                        aria-labelledby="tab-transfer"
                        class="tab-panel hidden space-y-6"
                    >
                        <!-- Recipient Keys -->
                        <div class="space-y-4">
                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                                <h4 class="text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide">Recipient Keys</h4>
                                <button
                                    type="button"
                                    id="transfer-addressbook-btn"
                                    class="p-2 bg-dark-800 hover:bg-dark-700 border border-dark-700 hover:border-brand-500 rounded-lg text-dark-400 hover:text-brand-500 transition-colors"
                                    title="Search Address Book"
                                    aria-label="Search address book for recipient"
                                >
                                    <svg class="w-4 h-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="M21 21l-4.35-4.35"/></svg>
                                </button>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Note Key (BN254) - used for commitment -->
                            <div>
                                <label for="transfer-recipient-key" class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 mb-1.5">
                                    Note Key <span class="text-dark-500">(BN254)</span>
                                </label>
                                <input
                                    type="text"
                                    id="transfer-recipient-key"
                                    placeholder="0x... (64 hex characters)"
                                    class="w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 placeholder:text-dark-600 placeholder:font-sans"
                                    autocomplete="off"
                                    spellcheck="false"
                                >
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-dark-500 mt-1">Used to create the note commitment (recipient proves ownership)</p>
                            </div>

                            <!-- Encryption Key (X25519) - used for encrypting note data -->
                            <div>
                                <label for="transfer-recipient-enc-key" class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 mb-1.5">
                                    Encryption Key <span class="text-dark-500">(X25519)</span>
                                </label>
                                <input
                                    type="text"
                                    id="transfer-recipient-enc-key"
                                    placeholder="0x... (64 hex characters)"
                                    class="w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 placeholder:text-dark-600 placeholder:font-sans"
                                    autocomplete="off"
                                    spellcheck="false"
                                >
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-dark-500 mt-1">Used to encrypt note data (recipient can decrypt to see amount)</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Amount (planner selects notes automatically) -->
                        <div id="transfer-amount-section">
                            <label for="transfer-amount" class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">
                                Amount to Send
                            </label>
                            <input
                                type="text"
                                id="transfer-amount"
                                placeholder="0.0"
                                inputmode="decimal"
                                class="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 placeholder:text-dark-600"
                                autocomplete="off"
                                spellcheck="false"
                            >
                            <p id="transfer-plan-hint" class="text-xs text-dark-500 mt-1 hidden" aria-live="polite"></p>
                        </div>

                        <label class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-dark-400 cursor-pointer select-none">
                            <input
                                type="checkbox"
                                id="transfer-advanced-mode"
                                class="rounded border-dark-600 bg-dark-800 text-brand-500 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-offset-dark-950"
                            >
                            Advanced (manual note selection)
                        </label>

                        <!-- Balance Equation (advanced) -->
                        <div id="transfer-advanced-section" class="hidden space-y-4">
                        <div id="transfer-balance" class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-2 p-3 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm" role="status" aria-live="polite">
                            <span class="font-mono px-2 py-1 bg-dark-700 rounded" data-eq="inputs">Inputs: 0</span>
                            <span class="text-dark-500">=</span>
                            <span class="font-mono px-2 py-1 bg-dark-700 rounded" data-eq="outputs">Outputs: 0</span>
                            <span class="ml-2" data-eq="status">
                                <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-500 hidden" data-icon="valid" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14"/><polyline points="22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01"/></svg>
                                <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-red-500 hidden" data-icon="invalid" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="15" y1="9" x2="9" y2="15"/><line x1="9" y1="9" x2="15" y2="15"/></svg>
                            </span>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Inputs / Outputs Grid -->
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                            <!-- Inputs Column -->
                            <fieldset>
                                <legend class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2 pb-2 border-b border-dark-700">
                                    Your Input Notes <span class="normal-case text-dark-500">(notes to spend)</span>
                                </legend>
                                <div id="transfer-inputs" class="space-y-2">
                                    <!-- Input rows will be created from template -->
                                </div>
                            </fieldset>

                            <!-- Outputs Column -->
                            <fieldset>
                                <legend class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2 pb-2 border-b border-dark-700">
                                    Recipient's Output Notes <span class="normal-case text-dark-500">(notes they will receive)</span>
                                </legend>
                                <div id="transfer-outputs" class="space-y-2">
                                    <!-- Output rows will be created from template -->
                                </div>
                            </fieldset>
                        </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Submit Button -->
                        <button
                            type="button"
                            id="btn-transfer"
                            class="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-500 to-brand-600 hover:from-brand-400 hover:to-brand-500 text-dark-950 font-semibold rounded-lg shadow-lg shadow-brand-500/25 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-dark-950 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
                        >
                            <span class="btn-text">Transfer</span>
                            <span class="btn-loading hidden"></span>
                        </button>
                        <p id="wallet-disclaimer-transfer" class="wallet-disclaimer text-center text-xs text-dark-500 mt-2">
                            Connect wallet to continue
                        </p>
                    </article>

                    <!-- Transact Panel -->
                    <article
                        role="tabpanel"
                        id="panel-transact"
                        aria-labelledby="tab-transact"
                        class="tab-panel hidden space-y-6"
                    >
                        <!-- Public Amount -->
                        <div>
                            <label for="transact-amount" class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">
                                Public Amount <span class="normal-case text-dark-500">(+ deposit, − withdraw)</span>
                            </label>
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                                <input
                                    type="range"
                                    id="transact-slider"
                                    min="-500"
                                    max="500"
                                    value="0"
                                    step="1"
                                    class="flex-1 h-1.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 via-dark-700 to-emerald-500 rounded-full appearance-none cursor-pointer"
                                    aria-label="Public amount slider"
                                >
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <div class="relative">
                                        <input
                                            type="number"
                                            id="transact-amount"
                                            value="0"
                                            step="0.0000001"
                                            class="w-24 px-3 py-2 pr-6 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-right font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500"
                                        >
                                        <div class="absolute right-1 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex flex-col">
                                            <button type="button" class="spinner-up p-0.5 text-dark-500 hover:text-brand-500" aria-label="Increase amount" data-target="transact-amount">
                                                <svg class="w-3 h-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"><path d="M18 15l-6-6-6 6"/></svg>
                                            </button>
                                            <button type="button" class="spinner-down p-0.5 text-dark-500 hover:text-brand-500" aria-label="Decrease amount" data-target="transact-amount">
                                                <svg class="w-3 h-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
                                            </button>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <span class="text-sm text-dark-500">XLM</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Balance Equation -->
                        <div id="transact-balance" class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-2 p-3 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm" role="status" aria-live="polite">
                            <span class="font-mono px-2 py-1 bg-dark-700 rounded" data-eq="inputs">Inputs: 0</span>
                            <span class="text-dark-500">+</span>
                            <span class="font-mono px-2 py-1 bg-dark-700 rounded" data-eq="public">Public: +0</span>
                            <span class="text-dark-500">=</span>
                            <span class="font-mono px-2 py-1 bg-dark-700 rounded" data-eq="outputs">Outputs: 0</span>
                            <span class="ml-2" data-eq="status">
                                <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-500 hidden" data-icon="valid" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14"/><polyline points="22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01"/></svg>
                                <svg class="w-5 h-5 text-red-500 hidden" data-icon="invalid" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="15" y1="9" x2="9" y2="15"/><line x1="9" y1="9" x2="15" y2="15"/></svg>
                            </span>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Inputs / Outputs Grid -->
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                            <!-- Inputs Column -->
                            <fieldset>
                                <legend class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2 pb-2 border-b border-dark-700">
                                    Inputs <span class="normal-case text-dark-500">(notes to spend)</span>
                                </legend>
                                <div id="transact-inputs" class="space-y-2">
                                    <!-- Input rows will be created from template -->
                                </div>
                            </fieldset>

                            <!-- Outputs Column -->
                            <fieldset>
                                <legend class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2 pb-2 border-b border-dark-700">
                                    Outputs <span class="normal-case text-dark-500">(new notes to create - each can have a different recipient)</span>
                                </legend>
                                <div id="transact-outputs" class="space-y-3">
                                    <!-- Advanced output rows will be created from template -->
                                </div>
                            </fieldset>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Recipient Address for Withdrawals -->
                        <div>
                            <label for="transact-recipient" class="block text-xs font-medium text-dark-400 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">
                                Withdrawal Recipient <span class="normal-case text-dark-500">(for public amount if negative)</span>
                            </label>
                            <input
                                type="text"
                                id="transact-recipient"
                                placeholder="G..."
                                class="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 placeholder:text-dark-600 placeholder:font-sans"
                                autocomplete="off"
                                spellcheck="false"
                            >
                        </div>

                        <!-- Submit Button -->
                        <button
                            type="button"
                            id="btn-transact"
                            class="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-500 to-brand-600 hover:from-brand-400 hover:to-brand-500 text-dark-950 font-semibold rounded-lg shadow-lg shadow-brand-500/25 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-dark-950 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
                        >
                            <span class="btn-text">Transact</span>
                            <span class="btn-loading hidden"></span>
                        </button>
                        <p id="wallet-disclaimer-transact" class="wallet-disclaimer text-center text-xs text-dark-500 mt-2">
                            Connect wallet to continue
                        </p>
                    </article>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Sidebar -->
            <aside class="flex flex-col gap-4 sm:gap-6 lg:sticky lg:top-6 lg:self-start">

                <!-- Contract State Panel -->
                <section class="bg-dark-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden" aria-labelledby="contract-state-heading">
                    <header class="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-800">
                        <h3 id="contract-state-heading" class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold">
                            <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-brand-500" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
                                <path d="M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16z"/>
                                <polyline points="7.5 4.21 12 6.81 16.5 4.21"/>
                                <polyline points="7.5 19.79 7.5 14.6 3 12"/>
                                <polyline points="21 12 16.5 14.6 16.5 19.79"/>
                                <polyline points="3.27 6.96 12 12.01 20.73 6.96"/>
                                <line x1="12" y1="22.08" x2="12" y2="12"/>
                            </svg>
                            On-Chain State
                        </h3>
                    </header>
                    <div class="p-4 space-y-3">
                        <!-- Network Badge -->
                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <span class="text-xs text-dark-500">Network</span>
                            <span id="chain-network-badge" class="px-2 py-0.5 bg-brand-500/20 text-brand-400 text-xs font-medium rounded">Testnet</span>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Pool Contract State -->
                        <div class="p-3 bg-dark-800 rounded-lg space-y-2">
                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                                <p class="text-xs font-semibold text-dark-200 flex items-center gap-1">
                                    <span id="pool-indicator" class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-dark-500"></span>
                                    Pool Contract
                                </p>
                                <span id="pool-status" class="text-[10px] text-dark-500">—</span>
                            </div>
                            <dl class="space-y-1.5 text-xs">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <dt class="text-dark-500">Address</dt>
                                    <dd class="font-mono text-dark-300 text-[10px]" id="pool-address">CBYH...REPU</dd>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <dt class="text-dark-500">Merkle Root</dt>
                                    <dd class="font-mono text-brand-400 text-[10px] truncate max-w-[120px]" id="pool-root" title="">—</dd>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <dt class="text-dark-500">Commitments</dt>
                                    <dd class="font-mono text-dark-300" id="pool-commitments">—</dd>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <dt class="text-dark-500">Levels</dt>
                                    <dd class="font-mono text-dark-300" id="pool-levels">—</dd>
                                </div>
                            </dl>
                        </div>

                        <!-- ASP Membership Contract State -->
                        <div class="p-3 bg-dark-800 rounded-lg space-y-2">
                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                                <p class="text-xs font-semibold text-dark-200 flex items-center gap-1">
                                    <span id="membership-indicator" class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-dark-500"></span>
                                    ASP Membership
                                </p>
                                <span id="membership-status" class="text-[10px] text-dark-500">—</span>
                            </div>
                            <dl class="space-y-1.5 text-xs">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <dt class="text-dark-500">Address</dt>
                                    <dd class="font-mono text-dark-300 text-[10px]" id="membership-address">CCIR...QH2H</dd>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <dt class="text-dark-500">Root</dt>
                                    <dd class="font-mono text-emerald-400 text-[10px] truncate max-w-[120px]" id="membership-root" title="">—</dd>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <dt class="text-dark-500">Members</dt>
                                    <dd class="font-mono text-dark-300" id="membership-count">—</dd>
                                </div>
                            </dl>
                        </div>

                        <!-- ASP Non-Membership Contract State -->
                        <div class="p-3 bg-dark-800 rounded-lg space-y-2">
                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                                <p class="text-xs font-semibold text-dark-200 flex items-center gap-1">
                                    <span id="nonmembership-indicator" class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-dark-500"></span>
                                    ASP Non-Membership
                                </p>
                                <span id="nonmembership-status" class="text-[10px] text-dark-500">—</span>
                            </div>
                            <dl class="space-y-1.5 text-xs">
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <dt class="text-dark-500">Address</dt>
                                    <dd class="font-mono text-dark-300 text-[10px]" id="nonmembership-address">CDI6...7Q2N</dd>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <dt class="text-dark-500">Root</dt>
                                    <dd class="font-mono text-amber-400 text-[10px] truncate max-w-[120px]" id="nonmembership-root" title="">—</dd>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <dt class="text-dark-500">Status</dt>
                                    <dd class="text-dark-300" id="nonmembership-tree-status">—</dd>
                                </div>
                            </dl>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Error Display -->
                        <div id="contract-error-display" class="hidden p-3 bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30 rounded-lg">
                            <p class="text-xs text-red-400 flex items-center gap-1">
                                <svg class="w-3 h-3" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="15" y1="9" x2="9" y2="15"/><line x1="9" y1="9" x2="15" y2="15"/></svg>
                                <span id="contract-error-text">Error loading contract state</span>
                            </p>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Last Updated -->
                        <p class="text-[10px] text-dark-600 text-center" id="state-last-updated">Last updated: —</p>
                    </div>
                </section>

                <!-- Stats Panel -->
                <section class="bg-dark-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden" aria-labelledby="stats-heading">
                    <h3 id="stats-heading" class="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-800 text-sm font-semibold">
                        <svg class="w-4 h-4 text-brand-500" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path d="M18 20V10M12 20V4M6 20v-6"/>
                        </svg>
                        Stats
                    </h3>
                    <div class="p-4 space-y-4">
                        <div>
                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                                <p class="text-xs text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Recent Pool Events</p>
                                <span id="recent-tx-status" class="text-[10px] text-dark-500">—</span>
                            </div>
                            <ul id="recent-tx" class="space-y-1.5" aria-label="Recent pool transactions">
                            </ul>
                            <div id="recent-tx-empty" class="hidden p-3 bg-dark-800 rounded-lg text-center">
                                <p class="text-xs text-dark-500">No transactions yet</p>
                                <p class="text-[10px] text-dark-600 mt-1">Pool events will appear here</p>
                            </div>
                            <div id="recent-tx-loading" class="hidden p-3 bg-dark-800 rounded-lg text-center">
                                <p class="text-xs text-dark-400 animate-pulse">Loading events...</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <p class="text-xs text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide mb-1">Total Commitments</p>
                            <p class="font-mono text-2xl font-semibold text-brand-400" id="pool-total">
                                <span id="pool-total-value">—</span>
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </section>
            </aside>
        </main>

        <!-- Notes & Address Book Section -->
        <section class="flex-1 flex flex-col bg-dark-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden" aria-labelledby="notes-section-heading">
            <h2 id="notes-section-heading" class="sr-only">Notes and Address Book</h2>

            <!-- Section Tab Navigation -->
            <nav class="flex p-1.5 gap-1 bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-800" role="tablist" aria-label="Notes section">
                <button
                    type="button"
                    role="tab"
                    id="section-tab-notes"
                    aria-selected="true"
                    aria-controls="section-panel-notes"
                    class="section-tab-btn flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-inset bg-dark-800 text-brand-500 border border-brand-500/30"
                    data-section-tab="notes"
                >
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
                        <path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/>
                        <polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/>
                        <line x1="16" y1="13" x2="8" y2="13"/>
                        <line x1="16" y1="17" x2="8" y2="17"/>
                    </svg>
                    Your Notes
                </button>
                <button
                    type="button"
                    role="tab"
                    id="section-tab-addressbook"
                    aria-selected="false"
                    aria-controls="section-panel-addressbook"
                    class="section-tab-btn flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-inset text-dark-400 hover:text-dark-200 hover:bg-dark-800"
                    data-section-tab="addressbook"
                >
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
                        <path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/>
                        <circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/>
                        <path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/>
                        <path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/>
                    </svg>
                    Address Book
                </button>
            </nav>

            <!-- Notes Panel -->
            <article
                role="tabpanel"
                id="section-panel-notes"
                aria-labelledby="section-tab-notes"
                class="section-panel flex-1 flex flex-col"
            >
                <header class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 border-b border-dark-800">
                    <h3 class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold text-dark-300">
                        Manage your private notes
                    </h3>
                    <div class="flex gap-1 p-0.5 bg-dark-800 rounded-lg" role="tablist" aria-label="Filter notes">
                        <button type="button" role="tab" aria-selected="true" class="filter-btn px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded bg-dark-700 text-dark-50" data-filter="all">All</button>
                        <button type="button" role="tab" aria-selected="false" class="filter-btn px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded text-dark-400 hover:text-dark-200" data-filter="unspent">Unspent</button>
                        <button type="button" role="tab" aria-selected="false" class="filter-btn px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded text-dark-400 hover:text-dark-200" data-filter="spent">Spent</button>
                    </div>
                </header>
                <div class="flex-1 overflow-auto min-h-[200px]">
                    <table class="w-full min-w-[600px]" aria-describedby="section-tab-notes">
                        <thead class="bg-dark-800 sticky top-0">
                            <tr>
                                <th scope="col" class="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Note ID</th>
                                <th scope="col" class="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Amount</th>
                                <th scope="col" class="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Created</th>
                                <th scope="col" class="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Status</th>
                                <th scope="col" class="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Actions</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody id="notes-tbody" class="divide-y divide-dark-800">
                            <!-- Rows created from template -->
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                    <div id="empty-notes" class="hidden flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 text-dark-500">
                        <svg class="w-12 h-12 mb-3 opacity-50" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/>
                            <polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/>
                        </svg>
                        <p class="text-sm">No notes yet. Make a deposit to create your first note.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </article>

            <!-- Address Book Panel -->
            <article
                role="tabpanel"
                id="section-panel-addressbook"
                aria-labelledby="section-tab-addressbook"
                class="section-panel hidden flex-1 flex flex-col"
            >
                <header class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 border-b border-dark-800">
                    <h3 class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold text-dark-300">
                        Registered public keys for transfers
                    </h3>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <div class="relative">
                            <input
                                type="text"
                                id="addressbook-search"
                                placeholder="Search by address (G...)"
                                class="w-64 px-3 py-1.5 pr-8 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg font-mono text-xs focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 placeholder:font-sans placeholder:text-dark-500"
                                autocomplete="off"
                                spellcheck="false"
                                title="Type a full address or partial prefix to filter"
                            >
                            <button
                                type="button"
                                id="addressbook-search-btn"
                                class="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-0.5 text-dark-500 hover:text-brand-500 transition-colors"
                                title="Search"
                                aria-label="Search address"
                            >
                                <svg class="w-4 h-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                    <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/>
                                    <path d="M21 21l-4.35-4.35"/>
                                </svg>
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <button
                            type="button"
                            id="addressbook-refresh-btn"
                            class="p-1.5 text-dark-400 hover:text-brand-500 transition-colors"
                            title="Refresh"
                            aria-label="Refresh address book"
                        >
                            <svg class="w-4 h-4 refresh-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                                <path d="M23 4v6h-6"/>
                                <path d="M1 20v-6h6"/>
                                <path d="M3.51 9a9 9 0 0 1 14.85-3.36L23 10M1 14l4.64 4.36A9 9 0 0 0 20.49 15"/>
                            </svg>

                        </button>
                    </div>
                </header>

                <!-- Registration hint -->
                <div class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-800/50 border-b border-dark-800">
                    <p class="text-xs text-dark-400">
                        <svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5 inline-block mr-1 -mt-0.5 text-brand-500" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                            <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/>
                            <path d="M12 16v-4"/>
                            <path d="M12 8h.01"/>
                        </svg>
                        Want others to find your public key? <span class="text-brand-400">Register your key</span> from the wallet menu to appear in address books.
                    </p>
                </div>

                <div class="flex-1 overflow-auto min-h-[200px]">
                    <table class="w-full min-w-[700px]" aria-describedby="section-tab-addressbook">
                        <thead class="bg-dark-800 sticky top-0">
                            <tr>
                                <th scope="col" class="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Stellar Address</th>
                                <th scope="col" class="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide">
                                    <span>Note Key</span>
                                    <span class="text-dark-600 font-normal normal-case ml-1">(BN254)</span>
                                </th>
                                <th scope="col" class="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide">
                                    <span>Encryption Key</span>
                                    <span class="text-dark-600 font-normal normal-case ml-1">(X25519)</span>
                                </th>
                                <th scope="col" class="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Registered</th>
                                <th scope="col" class="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-dark-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Actions</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody id="addressbook-tbody" class="divide-y divide-dark-800">
                            <!-- Rows created from template -->
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                    <div id="empty-addressbook" class="hidden flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 text-dark-500">
                        <svg class="w-12 h-12 mb-3 opacity-50" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true">
                            <path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/>
                            <circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/>
                            <path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/>
                            <path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/>
                        </svg>
                        <p class="text-sm">No registered public keys yet.</p>
                        <p class="text-xs text-dark-600 mt-1">Public keys appear here when users register them.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div id="addressbook-loading" class="hidden flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center py-12">
                        <div class="w-6 h-6 border-2 border-dark-600 border-t-brand-500 rounded-full animate-spin"></div>
                        <p class="text-sm text-dark-400 mt-3">Loading address book...</p>
                    </div>
                    <div id="addressbook-search-result" class="hidden p-4">
                        <!-- Search result will be rendered here -->
                    </div>
                </div>
            </article>
        </section>

        <!-- Toast Container -->
        <div id="toast-container" class="fixed bottom-4 right-4 flex flex-col gap-2 z-50" role="region" aria-label="Notifications" aria-live="polite"></div>

        <footer class="mt-8 border-t border-dark-800/80">
