@media screen and (min-width: 768px){.hs-form .hs_recaptcha{margin:2rem 0;}}/*!sc*/
.hs-form .input{line-height:0;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="text"],.hs-form input[type="tel"],.hs-form input[type="email"],.hs-form input[type="number"],.hs-form textarea,.hs-form select{font-family:"Inter",sans-serif;border:1px solid #969696;width:100%;border-radius:1.5rem;padding:0.625rem 1.5rem;margin-top:0.25rem;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="text"]:hover,.hs-form input[type="tel"]:hover,.hs-form input[type="email"]:hover,.hs-form input[type="number"]:hover,.hs-form textarea:hover,.hs-form select:hover{background-color:#f9f9f9;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="text"]:focus,.hs-form input[type="tel"]:focus,.hs-form input[type="email"]:focus,.hs-form input[type="number"]:focus,.hs-form textarea:focus,.hs-form select:focus{border-color:#0f0f0f;color:#0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="submit"]{background-color:#0f0f0f;font-size:1rem;color:#ffffff;padding:0.375rem 1.375rem;line-height:1.75rem;border:1px solid #0f0f0f;border-radius:6.25rem;font-weight:400;cursor:pointer;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]{cursor:pointer;width:1.5rem;height:1.5rem;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]:hover{border:1px solid #0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]:checked::before{background-color:#fdda24;border:6px solid #0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]::before{content:"";display:inline-block;width:1.5rem;height:1.5rem;margin-right:0.5rem;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid #969696;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]::before:hover{background-color:#f9f9f9;}/*!sc*/
.hs-field-desc{font-weight:400;font-size:0.75rem;line-height:2;margin:0.5rem 0;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox,.hs-form-booleancheckbox,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:flex-end;-webkit-box-align:flex-end;-ms-flex-align:flex-end;align-items:flex-end;-webkit-box-pack:start;-ms-flex-pack:start;-webkit-justify-content:flex-start;justify-content:flex-start;-webkit-box-flex-wrap:nowrap;-webkit-flex-wrap:nowrap;-ms-flex-wrap:nowrap;flex-wrap:nowrap;font-weight:400;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"],.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"],.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]{-webkit-appearance:none;-moz-appearance:none;-ms-appearance:none;appearance:none;width:1.5rem;height:1.5rem;border:1px solid #969696;border-radius:0.25rem;background-repeat:no-repeat;-webkit-background-position:center;background-position:center;cursor:pointer;font-weight:400;min-width:1.5rem;margin:0;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:hover{background-color:#f2f2f2;border:1 solid #0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:hover:checked,.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:checked{border:1 solid #0f0f0f;background-color:#0f0f0f;background-image:url('/images/check-yellow.svg');}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:checked:hover{border:1 solid #0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox span,.hs-form-booleancheckbox span,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display span{font-size:0.75rem;line-height:1.5rem;display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;-webkit-box-pack:center;-ms-flex-pack:center;-webkit-justify-content:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:400;-webkit-flex-basis:fit-content;-ms-flex-preferred-size:fit-content;flex-basis:fit-content;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox label,.hs-form-booleancheckbox label,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display label{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:flex-start;-webkit-box-align:flex-start;-ms-flex-align:flex-start;align-items:flex-start;margin:0.5rem 0;gap:0.5rem;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display span{display:inline;}/*!sc*/
.hs-fieldtype-select select{-webkit-appearance:none;-moz-appearance:none;-ms-appearance:none;appearance:none;padding-right:2rem;}/*!sc*/
.hs-fieldtype-select .input{display:inline-block;width:100%;position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.hs-fieldtype-select .input:after{content:"";position:absolute;top:1rem;right:1rem;width:1rem;height:1rem;background-image:url(/images/chevron-down.svg);background-repeat:no-repeat;-webkit-background-position:center;background-position:center;pointer-events:none;cursor:pointer;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-radio{margin:0.5rem 0;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-radio span{font-size:0.75rem;line-height:1.5rem;display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;-webkit-box-pack:center;-ms-flex-pack:center;-webkit-justify-content:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:400;-webkit-flex-basis:fit-content;-ms-flex-preferred-size:fit-content;flex-basis:fit-content;color:#000;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-radio label{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;gap:0.5rem;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-radio input{margin:0;width:1rem;height:1rem;}/*!sc*/
input[type=file]{margin-top:0.5rem;}/*!sc*/
.hs_error_rollup{border:0.125rem solid #ff3f00;border-radius:0.125rem;line-height:2rem;padding:0.75rem 1.5rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem;}/*!sc*/

:root{--mono-1:#f9f9f9;--mono-2:#00a7b5;--mono-3:#969696;--hue-1:#fdda24;--hue-2:#00a7b5;--hue-3:#b7ace8;--hue-4:#fdda24;--hue-5:#00a7b5;--hue-5-2:rgba(0, 167, 181, 0.8);--hue-6:#00a7b5;--syntax-fg:#b7ace8;--syntax-bg:#262626;--syntax-gutter:rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);--syntax-guide:rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);--syntax-selection-color:rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);--syntax-gutter-background-color-selected:#262626;--syntax-cursor-line:#ffffff;}/*!sc*/
code[class*="language-"],pre[class*="language-"]{background:var(--syntax-bg);color:var(--mono-1);direction:ltr;text-align:left;white-space:pre;word-spacing:normal;word-break:normal;font-size:0.875rem;line-height:1.125rem;-moz-tab-size:2;-o-tab-size:2;-moz-tab-size:2;tab-size:2;-webkit-hyphens:none;-moz-hyphens:none;-ms-hyphens:none;-webkit-hyphens:none;-moz-hyphens:none;-ms-hyphens:none;hyphens:none;}/*!sc*/
code[class*="language-"]::-moz-selection,code[class*="language-"] *::-moz-selection,pre[class*="language-"] *::-moz-selection{background:var(--syntax-selection-color);color:inherit;text-shadow:none;}/*!sc*/
code[class*="language-"]::selection,code[class*="language-"] *::selection,pre[class*="language-"] *::selection{background:var(--syntax-selection-color);color:inherit;text-shadow:none;}/*!sc*/
pre[class*="language-"]{padding:1em;margin:0.5em 0;overflow:auto;border-radius:0.3em;}/*!sc*/
:not(pre)>code[class*="language-"]{padding:0.2em 0.3em;border-radius:0.3em;white-space:normal;}/*!sc*/
@media print{code[class*="language-"],pre[class*="language-"]{text-shadow:none;}}/*!sc*/
.token.comment,.token.prolog,.token.cdata{color:var(--mono-3);}/*!sc*/
.token.doctype,.token.punctuation,.token.entity{color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.token.attr-name,.token.class-name,.token.boolean,.token.constant,.token.number,.token.atrule{color:var(--hue-6);}/*!sc*/
.token.keyword{color:var(--hue-3);}/*!sc*/
.token.property,.token.tag,.token.symbol,.token.deleted,.token.important{color:var(--hue-5);}/*!sc*/
.token.selector,.token.string,.token.char,.token.builtin,.token.inserted,.token.regex,.token.attr-value,.token.attr-value>.token.punctuation{color:var(--hue-4);}/*!sc*/
.token.variable,.token.operator,.token.function{color:var(--hue-2);}/*!sc*/
.token.url{color:var(--hue-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-rust .token.attr-name{color:var(--hue-4);}/*!sc*/
.token.attr-value>.token.punctuation.attr-equals,.token.special-attr>.token.attr-value>.token.value.css{color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-css .token.selector{color:var(--hue-5);}/*!sc*/
.language-css .token.property{color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-css .token.function,.language-css .token.url>.token.function{color:var(--hue-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-css .token.url>.token.string.url{color:var(--hue-4);}/*!sc*/
.language-css .token.important,.language-css .token.atrule .token.rule{color:var(--hue-3);}/*!sc*/
.language-javascript .token.operator{color:var(--hue-3);}/*!sc*/
.language-javascript .token.template-string>.token.interpolation>.token.interpolation-punctuation.punctuation{color:var(--hue-5-2);}/*!sc*/
.language-json .token.operator{color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-json .token.property{color:var(--hue-3);}/*!sc*/
.language-json .token.null.keyword{color:var(--hue-6);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.url,.language-markdown .token.url>.token.operator,.language-markdown .token.url-reference.url>.token.string{color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.url>.token.content{color:var(--hue-2);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.url>.token.url,.language-markdown .token.url-reference.url{color:var(--hue-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.blockquote.punctuation,.language-markdown .token.hr.punctuation{color:var(--mono-3);font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.code-snippet{color:var(--hue-4);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.bold .token.content{color:var(--hue-6);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.italic .token.content{color:var(--hue-3);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.strike .token.content,.language-markdown .token.strike .token.punctuation,.language-markdown .token.list.punctuation,.language-markdown .token.title.important>.token.punctuation{color:var(--hue-5);}/*!sc*/
.token.bold{font-weight:bold;}/*!sc*/
.token.italic{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.token.entity{cursor:help;}/*!sc*/
.token.namespace{opacity:0.8;}/*!sc*/
.token.token.tab:not(:empty):before,.token.token.cr:before,.token.token.lf:before,.token.token.space:before{color:var(--syntax-guide);text-shadow:none;}/*!sc*/
div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item{margin-right:0.4em;}/*!sc*/
div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>button,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>a,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>span{background:var(--syntax-gutter-background-color-selected);color:var(--mono-2);padding:0.5em 1em;border-radius:0.3em;cursor:pointer;}/*!sc*/
div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>button:hover,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>button:focus,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>a:hover,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>a:focus,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>span:hover,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>span:focus{background:var(--syntax-selection-color);color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.line-highlight.line-highlight{background:var(--syntax-cursor-line);}/*!sc*/
.line-highlight.line-highlight:before,.line-highlight.line-highlight[data-end]:after{background:var(--syntax-gutter-background-color-selected);color:var(--mono-1);padding:0.1em 0.6em;border-radius:0.3em;box-shadow:0 2px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2);}/*!sc*/
pre[id].linkable-line-numbers.linkable-line-numbers span.line-numbers-rows>span:hover:before{background-color:var(--syntax-cursor-line);}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers.line-numbers .line-numbers-rows,.command-line .command-line-prompt{border-right-color:var(--syntax-guide);}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers .line-numbers-rows>span:before,.command-line .command-line-prompt>span:before{color:var(--syntax-gutter);}/*!sc*/
.rainbow-braces .token.token.punctuation.brace-level-1,.rainbow-braces .token.token.punctuation.brace-level-5,.rainbow-braces .token.token.punctuation.brace-level-9{color:var(--hue-5);}/*!sc*/
.rainbow-braces .token.token.punctuation.brace-level-2,.rainbow-braces .token.token.punctuation.brace-level-6,.rainbow-braces .token.token.punctuation.brace-level-10{color:var(--hue-4);}/*!sc*/
.rainbow-braces .token.token.punctuation.brace-level-3,.rainbow-braces .token.token.punctuation.brace-level-7,.rainbow-braces .token.token.punctuation.brace-level-11{color:var(--hue-2);}/*!sc*/

.prism-previewer.prism-previewer:before,.prism-previewer-gradient.prism-previewer-gradient div{border-color:hsl(224,13%,17%);}/*!sc*/
.prism-previewer-color.prism-previewer-color:before,.prism-previewer-gradient.prism-previewer-gradient div,.prism-previewer-easing.prism-previewer-easing:before{border-radius:0.3em;}/*!sc*/
.prism-previewer.prism-previewer:after{border-top-color:hsl(224,13%,17%);}/*!sc*/

.prism-previewer-angle.prism-previewer-angle:before,.prism-previewer-time.prism-previewer-time:before,.prism-previewer-easing.prism-previewer-easing{background:hsl(219,13%,22%);}/*!sc*/

.prism-previewer-easing.prism-previewer-easing circle{fill:transparent;}/*!sc*/
pre[class*="language-"].line-numbers{position:relative;padding-left:3.8em;counter-reset:linenumber;}/*!sc*/
pre[class*="language-"].line-numbers>code{position:relative;white-space:inherit;}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers .line-numbers-rows{position:absolute;pointer-events:none;top:0;font-size:100%;left:-3.8em;width:3em;letter-spacing:-1px;border-right:1px solid;-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-ms-user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-ms-user-select:none;user-select:none;}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers-rows>span{display:block;counter-increment:linenumber;}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers-rows>span:before{content:counter(linenumber);color:red;display:block;padding-right:0.8em;text-align:right;}/*!sc*/
data-styled.g135[id="sc-global-eMkfHm1"]{content:"sc-global-eMkfHm1,"}/*!sc*/
.katex{font-family:'lora','lora Fallback',serif;line-height:1.2;text-indent:0;text-rendering:auto;font-size:1.5rem;}/*!sc*/
.katex *{-ms-high-contrast-adjust:none!important;}/*!sc*/
.katex *{border-color:currentColor;}/*!sc*/
.katex .katex-version::after{content:"0.16.8";}/*!sc*/
.katex .katex-mathml{position:absolute;clip:rect(1px,1px,1px,1px);padding:0;border:0;height:1px;width:1px;overflow:hidden;}/*!sc*/
.katex .katex-html>.newline{display:block;}/*!sc*/
.katex .base{position:relative;display:inline-block;white-space:nowrap;width:-webkit-min-content;width:-moz-min-content;width:-webkit-min-content;width:-moz-min-content;width:min-content;}/*!sc*/
.katex .strut{display:inline-block;}/*!sc*/
.katex .textbf{font-weight:bold;}/*!sc*/
.katex .textit{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathnormal{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathit{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathrm{font-style:normal;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathbf{font-weight:bold;}/*!sc*/
.katex .boldsymbol{font-weight:bold;font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathboldsf,.katex .textboldsf{font-weight:bold;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathitsf,.katex .textitsf{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mainrm{font-style:normal;}/*!sc*/

.katex .vlist-r{display:table-row;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist{display:table-cell;vertical-align:bottom;position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist>span{display:block;height:0;position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist>span>span{display:inline-block;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist>span>.pstrut{overflow:hidden;width:0;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist-t2{margin-right:-2px;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist-s{display:table-cell;vertical-align:bottom;font-size:1px;width:2px;min-width:2px;}/*!sc*/

.katex .hbox{display:-webkit-inline-box;display:-webkit-inline-flex;display:-ms-inline-flexbox;display:inline-flex;-webkit-flex-direction:row;-ms-flex-direction:row;flex-direction:row;width:100%;}/*!sc*/
.katex .thinbox{display:-webkit-inline-box;display:-webkit-inline-flex;display:-ms-inline-flexbox;display:inline-flex;-webkit-flex-direction:row;-ms-flex-direction:row;flex-direction:row;width:0;max-width:0;}/*!sc*/

hitExr gSSQkd"><figure width="100%" height="100%" class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-hxyrwO jJeuXN fIRjaX dKpNEv"><picture><source srcSet="data:image/png;base64,"/><img srcSet="data:image/png;base64," class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 sc-a236a696-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF jjrsBs" width="100%"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-3 emCDng"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-7 haqGDy"><div class="sc-577d91a0-3 erWDBq"><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">RISC Zero provides an execution environment where we can compute large amounts of data off-chain and then verify the output in a Stellar smart contract. This has the potential to expand the boundaries of decentralized computing, so let’s open up a console window and get verifying.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">You’ll need a Unix-based environment. If you are on Windows, try <a href="https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/wsl/install" aria-label="Windows Subsystem for " class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">Windows Subsystem for </span></span></a>Linux. You’ll also need <a href="https://rust-lang.org/" aria-label="Rust" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">Rust</span></span></a> installed and the <a href="https://developers.stellar.org/docs/build/smart-contracts/getting-started/setup#install-the-stellar-cli" aria-label="stellar " class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">stellar </span></span></a>CLI.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Let’s install RISC Zero and set up an example program to verify.<br/><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">curl -L https://risczero.com/install | bash</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">rzup install</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Once we have that up and running, let’s clone the repository at:</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">git clone https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments.git</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Within this repository is a RISC Zero application called greater_than that has two parts:</p><ul class="sc-577d91a0-14 A-dlFY"><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">The guest crate is the code that will run inside the zkVM</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">The host crate is the code that orchestrates proof generation on your machine</li></ul><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Let’s take a look at the main function within the guest program that runs on the zkVM host:</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><a href="https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments/blob/main/greater_than/methods/guest/src/main.rs" aria-label="https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments/blob/main/greater_than/methods/guest/src/main.rs" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments/blob/main/greater_than/methods/guest/src/main.rs</span></span></a><br/><br/><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">fn main() { </code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">   let a: u32 = env::read(); </code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">   let b: u32 = env::read(); </code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">   if !(a &gt; b) { </code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">       panic!(&quot;Condition failed: a is not greater than b&quot;); } env::commit(&amp;1u32);</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">}</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Here we are reading two u32 numeric variables and then checking that a is not greater than b. If it is, we panic; if not, we send back a 1.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">We then have the host application to run this, which can be found here: <a href="https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments/blob/main/greater_than/host/src/main.rs" aria-label="https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments/blob/main/greater_than/host/src/main.rs" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments/blob/main/greater_than/host/src/main.rs</span></span></a></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">This will create a proof and output 3 values when run:<code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">
println!(&quot;Seal (hex): {}&quot;, hex::encode(seal));println!(&quot;Image ID (hex): {}&quot;, hex::encode(image_id.as_bytes()));println!(&quot;Journal SHA-256 (hex): {}&quot;, hex::encode(journal_sha256.as_bytes()));</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">It’s these values that we need to verify the proof within a Stellar smart contract. Let’s fire up dockerd in the background and then run the code.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">sudo dockerd &amp;</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">RISC0_DEV_MODE=0 cargo run --release</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">After a couple of minutes, we should get an output something like this:</p><div class="sc-577d91a0-12 gjIIaB"><figure width="100%" height="100%" class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-hxyrwO jJeuXN fIRjaX dKpNEv sc-e9f0b436-0 fvIMAa"><picture><source media="(min-width: 0px) and (max-width: 767px)" srcSet="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece-1734x927.png?w=768&amp;auto=format, https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece-1734x927.png?w=768&amp;auto=format&amp;dpr=2 2x"/><source media="(min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 1079px)" srcSet="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece-1734x927.png?w=1280&amp;auto=format, https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece-1734x927.png?w=1280&amp;auto=format&amp;dpr=2 2x"/><source media="(min-width: 1080px)" srcSet="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece-1734x927.png?w=1440&amp;auto=format, https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece-1734x927.png?w=1440&amp;auto=format&amp;dpr=2 2x"/><img srcSet="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece-1734x927.png?w=768&amp;auto=format, https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece-1734x927.png?w=768&amp;auto=format&amp;dpr=2 2x" loading="lazy" class="sc-xuTxv bCFiyR"/></picture></figure></div><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">We now have everything we need to verify the proof in a Stellar smart contract.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Let’s go ahead and clone the Nethermind risc0 verifier contract from here:<a href="https://github.com/NethermindEth/stellar-risc0-verifier/" aria-label="https://github.com/NethermindEth/stellar-risc0-verifier/" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">https://github.com/NethermindEth/stellar-risc0-verifier/</span></span></a></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">git clone https://github.com/NethermindEth/stellar-risc0-verifier.git</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Now let’s build and deploy the contract using the Stellar CLI. </p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Note you’ll need some XLM to send the transactions, which you can get for Testnet here: <a href="https://lab.stellar.org/account/fund?$=network$id=testnet" aria-label="https://lab.stellar.org/account/fund?$=network$id=testnet" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">https://lab.stellar.org/account/fund?$=network$id=testnet</span></span></a></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">stellar contract build</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">stellar contract deploy --wasm target/wasm32v1-none/release/groth16_verifier.wasm --source james --network testnet</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Once deployed, we will be provided with a contractId that we can use to invoke function calls. We will call the selector function, which returns a 4 byte hex code. We will later copy and paste this 4 byte hex code in front of the seal.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">stellar contract invoke --network testnet --id CBY3GOBGQXDGRR4K2KYJO2UOXDW5NRW6UKIQHUBNBNU2V3BXQBXGTVX7 --source-account james -- selector</code></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">&quot;73c457ba&quot;</code><br/>Let’s use this in the main verify function, passing in the sha256 hash of the journal, the image id and the seal with the selector added to the beginning:<br/></p><div class="sc-17cc7162-0 kmKIXP"><pre class="sc-17cc7162-1 XfmpK copy-to-clipboard line-numbers"><code class="language-rust" data-prismjs-copy="Copy" role="code">stellar contract invoke --network testnet --id CBY3GOBGQXDGRR4K2KYJO2UOXDW5NRW6UKIQHUBNBNU2V3BXQBXGTVX7 --source-account james --send=yes -- verify --journal 67abdd721024f0ff4e0b3f4c2fc13bc5bad42d0b7851d456d88d203d15aaa450 --image_id 9dee6122483cff892f04913c0d37f8ef1732f438551e204e11e9db56e27d3cd1 --seal 
</code></pre></div><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><br/>If the Groth16 proof verifies, you’ll get a null response and no panics. This is the Stellar CLI’s way of printing () (unit) as the verify function returns Result&lt;(),VerifierError&gt;</p><div class="sc-577d91a0-12 gjIIaB"><figure width="100%" height="100%" class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-hxyrwO jJeuXN fIRjaX dKpNEv sc-e9f0b436-0 fvIMAa"><picture><source media="(min-width: 0px) and (max-width: 767px)" srcSet="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0-1860x984.png?w=768&amp;auto=format, https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0-1860x984.png?w=768&amp;auto=format&amp;dpr=2 2x"/><source media="(min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 1079px)" srcSet="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0-1860x984.png?w=1280&amp;auto=format, https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0-1860x984.png?w=1280&amp;auto=format&amp;dpr=2 2x"/><source media="(min-width: 1080px)" srcSet="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0-1860x984.png?w=1440&amp;auto=format, https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0-1860x984.png?w=1440&amp;auto=format&amp;dpr=2 2x"/><img srcSet="https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0-1860x984.png?w=768&amp;auto=format, https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0-1860x984.png?w=768&amp;auto=format&amp;dpr=2 2x" loading="lazy" class="sc-xuTxv bCFiyR"/></picture></figure></div><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">This basic example should get you up and running. The beauty of this is that you could prove in a single transaction a complex computation involving megabytes of data, which would be impossible to do directly on-chain.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">That computation could open up new logic within a decentralized smart contract, creating new possibilities for builders creating the next generation of zero knowledge technology on Stellar.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">For more information, check out the following resources:</p><ul class="sc-577d91a0-14 A-dlFY"><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl"><a href="https://dev.risczero.com/" aria-label="https://dev.risczero.com/" class="sc-gJhJfT cDlpCt">https://dev.risczero.com/</span></span></a></li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl"><a href="https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments" Zero provides an execution environment where we can compute large amounts of data off-chain and then verify the output in a Stellar smart contract. This has the potential to expand the boundaries of decentralized computing, so let’s open up a console window and get verifying."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"ef1d2d586b05","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"cd37756fa0f0","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"You’ll need a Unix-based environment. You’ll also need "},{"_key":"f3b9eee016b3","_type":"span","marks":["47fa547aa2fb"],"text":"Rust"},{"_key":"5c8069e7ec97","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":" installed and the "},{"_key":"98b798d30dd0","_type":"span","marks":["309446a32413"],"text":"stellar "},{"_key":"076462d6b522","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"CLI."}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"d066dd3b6d7d","_type":"link","href":"https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/wsl/install"},{"_key":"47fa547aa2fb","_type":"link","href":"https://rust-lang.org/"},{"_key":"309446a32413","_type":"link","href":"https://developers.stellar.org/docs/build/smart-contracts/getting-started/setup#install-the-stellar-cli"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"fcb4bcec781e","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"ce3362018bee","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Let’s the repository at:"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"a1d3ead15e0d","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"a4fb154e937e","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"git clone "},{"_key":"a06189439e11","_type":"span","marks":["f95e00e04187","code"],"text":"https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments.git"}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"f95e00e04187","_type":"link","href":"https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments.git"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"a15538232ee5","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"a52401fdcef4","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Within this repository is a RISC Zero application called greater_than that has two parts:"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"fcc76e769eb0","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"c53c4c2f2f11","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"The guest crate is the code that will run inside the zkVM"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"0af01ffad017","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"759fb161e347","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"The host crate is the code that orchestrates proof generation on your machine"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"9f43d6ba104b","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"e9075538a8e6","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Let’s take a look at the main function within the guest program that runs on the zkVM host:"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"ab2dee89b367","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"44dfa52595cd","_type":"span","marks":["3307b3b97a1b"],"text":"https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments/blob/main/greater_than/methods/guest/src/main.rs"},{"_key":"b3e6b9d86c75","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"\n\n"},{"_key":"84689981f0df","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"fn main() { "}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"3307b3b97a1b","_type":"link","href":"https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments/blob/main/greater_than/methods/guest/src/main.rs"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"a6e2f3270bfc","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"7b3dba07e52e","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"   let a: u32 = env::read(); "}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"9577cc2e09cc","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"db28f52ee919","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"   let b: u32 = env::read(); "}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"ccfdd79b8353","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"a07bb1784d6a","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"   if !(a \u003e b) { "}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"205f87920d81","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"0c55b7f1c379","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"       panic!(\"Condition failed: a is not greater than b\"); } env::commit(\u00261u32);"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"7ab8bd10d60c","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"130b99abc730","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"}"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"c6211fc7a124","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"e3e33a1824ba","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Here we are reading two u32 numeric variables and then checking that a is not greater than b. If it is, we panic; if not, we send back a 1."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"110af325c6cf","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"e71de6ac8aa7","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"We then have the host application to run this, which can be found here: "},{"_key":"7e9d75658525","_type":"span","marks":["5b43e7e67231"],"text":"https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments/blob/main/greater_than/host/src/main.rs"}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"5b43e7e67231","_type":"link","href":"https://github.com/jamesbachini/RiscZero-Experiments/blob/main/greater_than/host/src/main.rs"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"426ebec4e5c0","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"955641871677","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"This will create a proof and output 3 values when run:"},{"_key":"98e297bd5cc4","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"\nprintln!(\"Seal (hex): {}\", hex::encode(seal));println!(\"Image ID (hex): {}\", hex::encode(image_id.as_bytes()));println!(\"Journal SHA-256 (hex): {}\", hex::encode(journal_sha256.as_bytes()));"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"3b060c0d47b1","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"f353b89051f4","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"It’s these values that we need to verify the proof within a Stellar smart contract. Let’s fire up dockerd in the background and then run the code."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"c9bb365cd671","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"15e66ff9f0e7","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"sudo dockerd \u0026"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"13f5f9916e87","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"6bd477594f5c","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"RISC0_DEV_MODE=0 cargo run --release"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"9da8f45214ec","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"ec4f462de852","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"After a couple of minutes, we should get an output something like this:"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"dd4d8e550562","_type":"imageObject","aspectRatio":"auto","image":{"_type":"image","asset":{"_createdAt":"2026-02-10T21:00:37Z","_id":"image-c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece-1734x927-png","_rev":"MehbQFMxa4CRpT9n7wbQic","_type":"sanity.imageAsset","_updatedAt":"2026-02-10T21:00:37Z","assetId":"c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece","extension":"png","metadata":{"_type":"sanity.imageMetadata","blurHash":"M14LXgx]ImouWT~qoyNFk9Wn9FRjofWUof","dimensions":{"_type":"sanity.imageDimensions","aspectRatio":1.8705501618122977,"height":927,"width":1734},"hasAlpha":true,"isOpaque":true,"lqip":"data:image/png;base64,","palette":{"_type":"sanity.imagePalette","darkMuted":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#356733","foreground":"#fff","population":0.19,"title":"#fff"},"darkVibrant":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#171c64","foreground":"#fff","population":0.01,"title":"#fff"},"dominant":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#356733","foreground":"#fff","population":0.19,"title":"#fff"},"lightMuted":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#8b8899","foreground":"#fff","population":0.02,"title":"#fff"},"lightVibrant":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#a4add5","foreground":"#000","population":0,"title":"#fff"},"muted":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#7e7485","foreground":"#fff","population":0.04,"title":"#fff"},"vibrant":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#445494","foreground":"#fff","population":0,"title":"#fff"}},"thumbHash":"x/cFBIBpeIePhndzeHb4hwczdA=="},"mimeType":"image/png","originalFilename":"image2.png","path":"images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece-1734x927.png","sha1hash":"c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece","size":158958,"uploadId":"Jv8xeA72lvQ7giAnycbYZc5fuY9xA7xH","url":"https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/c3a634a5068732e6e189ccb2c13bfeb4b1c8bece-1734x927.png"}}},{"_key":"dd76de7960f5","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"d3be3adae08f","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"We now have everything we need to verify the proof in a Stellar smart contract."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"d0e05e5931d1","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"9c94f12e19d5","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Let’s go ahead and clone the Nethermind risc0 verifier contract from here:"},{"_key":"0759bc85fc1e","_type":"span","marks":["0b73d2a9f1c5"],"text":"https://github.com/NethermindEth/stellar-risc0-verifier/"}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"0b73d2a9f1c5","_type":"link","href":"https://github.com/NethermindEth/stellar-risc0-verifier/"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"9fe86672f02e","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"9ca74551af7b","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"git clone https://github.com/NethermindEth/stellar-risc0-verifier.git"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"c2e5d7a774b8","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"c1c52a406a04","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Now let’s build and deploy the contract using the Stellar CLI. "}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"db6bfe1f4f37","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"0fd212b239f5","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Note you’ll need some XLM to send the transactions, which you can get for Testnet here: "},{"_key":"0d0e3ad1286d","_type":"span","marks":["9d791705d9a8"],"text":"https://lab.stellar.org/account/fund?$=network$id=testnet"}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"9d791705d9a8","_type":"link","href":"https://lab.stellar.org/account/fund?$=network$id=testnet"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"1a8254046c1d","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"b7f342b88665","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"stellar contract build"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"d60a63b58a31","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"ac0604cd2c8b","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"stellar contract deploy --wasm target/wasm32v1-none/release/groth16_verifier.wasm --source james --network testnet"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"a887201b4b5a","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"892f74aebfe8","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Once deployed, we will be provided with a contractId that we can use to invoke function calls. We will call the selector function, which returns a 4 byte hex code. We will later copy and paste this 4 byte hex code in front of the seal."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"5fd7a41ef971","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"3643e5c286fa","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"stellar contract invoke --network testnet --id CBY3GOBGQXDGRR4K2KYJO2UOXDW5NRW6UKIQHUBNBNU2V3BXQBXGTVX7 --source-account james -- selector"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"4796975bd451","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"28c0f9092219","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"\"73c457ba\""},{"_key":"38ec8666ea33","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"\nLet’s use this in the main verify function, passing in the sha256 hash of the journal, the image id and the seal with the selector added to the beginning:\n"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"382ee529ff18","_type":"code","code":"stellar contract invoke --network testnet --id CBY3GOBGQXDGRR4K2KYJO2UOXDW5NRW6UKIQHUBNBNU2V3BXQBXGTVX7 --source-account james --send=yes -- verify --journal 67abdd721024f0ff4e0b3f4c2fc13bc5bad42d0b7851d456d88d203d15aaa450 --image_id 9dee6122483cff892f04913c0d37f8ef1732f438551e204e11e9db56e27d3cd1 --seal \n","language":"rust"},{"_key":"ef751c68ee8a","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"1660f816c057","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"\nIf the Groth16 proof verifies, you’ll get a null response and no panics. This is the Stellar CLI’s way of printing () (unit) as the verify function returns Result\u003c(),VerifierError\u003e"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"b51a916780a6","_type":"imageObject","aspectRatio":"auto","image":{"_type":"image","asset":{"_createdAt":"2026-02-12T18:08:21Z","_id":"image-10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0-1860x984-png","_rev":"Bct4n0NGHPnUQicpMw15Xs","_type":"sanity.imageAsset","_updatedAt":"2026-02-12T18:08:21Z","assetId":"10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0","extension":"png","metadata":{"_type":"sanity.imageMetadata","blurHash":"M242PCo#WTk9WV~qkCWUj?WVxtWAf6aejZ","dimensions":{"_type":"sanity.imageDimensions","aspectRatio":1.8902439024390243,"height":984,"width":1860},"hasAlpha":true,"isOpaque":true,"lqip":"data:image/png;base64,","palette":{"_type":"sanity.imagePalette","darkMuted":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#343458","foreground":"#fff","population":0.05,"title":"#fff"},"darkVibrant":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#040a30","foreground":"#fff","population":0.14,"title":"#fff"},"dominant":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#8c8d8e","foreground":"#fff","population":0.27,"title":"#fff"},"lightMuted":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#8c8d8e","foreground":"#fff","population":0.27,"title":"#fff"},"lightVibrant":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#54d0f0","foreground":"#000","population":0.01,"title":"#fff"},"muted":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#886c68","foreground":"#fff","population":0.01,"title":"#fff"},"vibrant":{"_type":"sanity.imagePaletteSwatch","background":"#1f99c7","foreground":"#fff","population":0.03,"title":"#fff"}}},"mimeType":"image/png","originalFilename":"risczero_testnet.png","path":"images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0-1860x984.png","sha1hash":"10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0","size":632634,"uploadId":"PmQcCEB9VlyKI2sniO3rbA0ah9WpbHWj","url":"https://cdn.sanity.io/images/e2r40yh6/production-i18n/10e1c45a908eb86f8830e617a7cdb634f7de7bb0-1860x984.png"}}},{"_key":"df329aaa8556","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"52d8372e2fa9","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"This basic example should get you up and running. The beauty of this is that you could prove in a single transaction a complex computation involving megabytes of data, which would be impossible to do directly on-chain."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"b4e7a6684a94","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"97e8a00dc5da","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"That computation could open up new logic within a decentralized smart contract, creating new possibilities for builders creating the next generation of zero knowledge technology on .hs-form input[type="radio"]:checked::before{background-color:#fdda24;border:6px solid #0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]::before{content:"";display:inline-block;width:1.5rem;height:1.5rem;margin-right:0.5rem;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid #969696;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]::before:hover{background-color:#f9f9f9;}/*!sc*/

.hs-form-checkbox,.hs-form-booleancheckbox,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:flex-end;-webkit-box-align:flex-end;-ms-flex-align:flex-end;align-items:flex-end;-webkit-box-pack:start;-ms-flex-pack:start;-webkit-justify-content:flex-start;justify-content:flex-start;-webkit-box-flex-wrap:nowrap;-webkit-flex-wrap:nowrap;-ms-flex-wrap:nowrap;flex-wrap:nowrap;font-weight:400;}/*!sc*/

.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:hover{background-color:#f2f2f2;border:1 solid #0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:hover:checked,.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:checked{border:1 solid #0f0f0f;background-color:#0f0f0f;background-image:url('/images/check-yellow.svg');}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:checked:hover{border:1 solid #0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/

.hs-fieldtype-select .input:after{content:"";position:absolute;top:1rem;right:1rem;width:1rem;height:1rem;background-image:url(/images/chevron-down.svg);background-repeat:no-repeat;-webkit-background-position:center;background-position:center;pointer-events:none;cursor:pointer;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-radio{margin:0.5rem 0;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-radio span{font-size:0.75rem;line-height:1.5rem;display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;-webkit-box-pack:center;-ms-flex-pack:center;-webkit-justify-content:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:400;-webkit-flex-basis:fit-content;-ms-flex-preferred-size:fit-content;flex-basis:fit-content;color:#000;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-radio label{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;gap:0.5rem;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;}/*!sc*/

code[class*="language-"],pre[class*="language-"]{background:var(--syntax-bg);color:var(--mono-1);direction:ltr;text-align:left;white-space:pre;word-spacing:normal;word-break:normal;font-size:0.875rem;line-height:1.125rem;-moz-tab-size:2;-o-tab-size:2;-moz-tab-size:2;tab-size:2;-webkit-hyphens:none;-moz-hyphens:none;-ms-hyphens:none;-webkit-hyphens:none;-moz-hyphens:none;-ms-hyphens:none;hyphens:none;}/*!sc*/

code[class*="language-"]::selection,code[class*="language-"] *::selection,pre[class*="language-"] *::selection{background:var(--syntax-selection-color);color:inherit;text-shadow:none;}/*!sc*/
pre[class*="language-"]{padding:1em;margin:0.5em 0;overflow:auto;border-radius:0.3em;}/*!sc*/
:not(pre)>code[class*="language-"]{padding:0.2em 0.3em;border-radius:0.3em;white-space:normal;}/*!sc*/
@media print{code[class*="language-"],pre[class*="language-"]{text-shadow:none;}}/*!sc*/

pre[class*="language-"].line-numbers>code{position:relative;white-space:inherit;}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers .line-numbers-rows{position:absolute;pointer-events:none;top:0;font-size:100%;left:-3.8em;width:3em;letter-spacing:-1px;border-right:1px solid;-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-ms-user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-ms-user-select:none;user-select:none;}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers-rows>span{display:block;counter-increment:linenumber;}/*!sc*/

.katex .katex-html>.newline{display:block;}/*!sc*/

.katex .textbf{font-weight:bold;}/*!sc*/
.katex .textit{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathnormal{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathit{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathrm{font-style:normal;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathbf{font-weight:bold;}/*!sc*/

.katex .mathitsf,.katex .textitsf{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/

.katex .vbox{display:-webkit-inline-box;display:-webkit-inline-flex;display:-ms-inline-flexbox;display:inline-flex;-webkit-flex-direction:column;-ms-flex-direction:column;flex-direction:column;-webkit-align-items:baseline;-webkit-box-align:baseline;-ms-flex-align:baseline;align-items:baseline;}/*!sc*/
.katex .hbox{display:-webkit-inline-box;display:-webkit-inline-flex;display:-ms-inline-flexbox;display:inline-flex;-webkit-flex-direction:row;-ms-flex-direction:row;flex-direction:row;width:100%;}/*!sc*/

.katex .nulldelimiter{display:inline-block;width:0.12em;}/*!sc*/
.katex .delimcenter{position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.katex .op-symbol{position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.katex .op-limits>.vlist-t{text-align:center;}/*!sc*/
.katex .accent>.vlist-t{text-align:center;}/*!sc*/
.katex .accent .accent-body{position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.katex .accent .accent-body:not(.accent-full){width:0;}/*!sc*/
.katex .overlay{display:block;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mtable .vertical-separator{display:inline-block;min-width:1px;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mtable .arraycolsep{display:inline-block;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mtable .col-align-c>.vlist-t{text-align:center;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mtable .col-align-l>.vlist-t{text-align:left;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mtable .col-align-r>.vlist-t{text-align:right;}/*!sc*/
.katex .svg-align{text-align:left;}/*!sc*/
.katex svg{display:block;position:absolute;width:100%;height:inherit;fill:currentColor;stroke:currentColor;fill-rule:nonzero;fill-opacity:1;stroke-width:1;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;stroke-miterlimit:4;stroke-dasharray:none;stroke-dashoffset:0;stroke-opacity:1;}/*!sc*/
.katex svg path{stroke:none;}/*!sc*/
.katex img{border-style:none;min-width:0;min-height:0;max-width:none;max-height:none;}/*!sc*/
.katex .stretchy{width:100%;display:block;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}/*!sc*/
.katex .stretchy::before,.katex .stretchy::after{content:"";}/*!sc*/
.katex .hide-tail{width:100%;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}/*!sc*/
.katex .halfarrow-left{position:absolute;left:0;width:50.2%;overflow:hidden;}/*!sc*/
.katex .halfarrow-right{position:absolute;right:0;width:50.2%;overflow:hidden;}/*!sc*/
.katex .brace-left{position:absolute;left:0;width:25.1%;overflow:hidden;}/*!sc*/
.katex .brace-center{position:absolute;left:25%;width:50%;overflow:hidden;}/*!sc*/
.katex .brace-right{position:absolute;right:0;width:25.1%;overflow:hidden;}/*!sc*/
.katex .x-arrow-pad{padding:0 0.5em;}/*!sc*/
.katex .cd-arrow-pad{padding:0 0.55556em 0 0.27778em;}/*!sc*/
.katex .x-arrow,.katex .mover,.katex .munder{text-align:center;}/*!sc*/
.katex .boxpad{padding:0 0.3em;}/*!sc*/
.katex .fbox,.katex .fcolorbox{box-sizing:border-box;border:0.04em solid;}/*!sc*/
.katex .cancel-pad{padding:0 0.2em;}/*!sc*/
.katex .cancel-lap{margin-left:-0.2em;margin-right:-0.2em;}/*!sc*/
.katex .sout{border-bottom-style:solid;border-bottom-width:0.08em;}/*!sc*/
.katex .angl{box-sizing:border-box;border-top:0.049em solid;border-right:0.049em solid;margin-right:0.03889em;}/*!sc*/
.katex .anglpad{padding:0 0.03889em;}/*!sc*/
.katex .eqn-num::before{counter-increment:katexEqnNo;content:"(" counter(katexEqnNo) ")";}/*!sc*/
.katex .mml-eqn-num::before{counter-increment:mmlEqnNo;content:"(" counter(mmlEqnNo) ")";}/*!sc*/
.katex .mtr-glue{width:50%;}/*!sc*/
.katex .cd-vert-arrow{display:inline-block;position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.katex .cd-label-left{display:inline-block;position:absolute;right:calc(50% + 0.3em);text-align:left;}/*!sc*/
.katex .cd-label-right{display:inline-block;position:absolute;left:calc(50% + 0.3em);text-align:right;}/*!sc*/
.katex-display{display:block;margin:1.5rem 0;text-align:center;}/*!sc*/
.katex-display>.katex{display:block;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;}/*!sc*/
.katex-display>.katex>.katex-html{display:block;position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.katex-display>.katex>.katex-html>.tag{position:absolute;right:0;}/*!sc*/
.katex-display.leqno>.katex>.katex-html>.tag{left:0;right:auto;}/*!sc*/
.katex-display.fleqn>.katex{text-align:left;padding-left:2em;}/*!sc*/
body{counter-reset:katexEqnNo mmlEqnNo;}/*!sc*/

ghljMS sc-7a289d1c-2 ffDKwA"><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" shape-rendering="crispEdges"><path d="M16 4.5H0V3.5H16V4.5Z"></path><path d="M16 8.5H0V7.5H16V8.5Z"></path><path d="M0 sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-la-DyAJ sc-iCZxss fIRjaX deeBHi"><div height="64" class="sc-iKTbCL iJqgso"></div><div class="sc-gLXRQG jUVQMX sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-la-DyAJ sc-iCZxss fIRjaX deeBHi"><div class="" style="position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:2px;background:transparent;z-index:99999999999;width:100%"><div class="" style="height:100%;background:#fdda24;transition:all 500ms ease;width:0%"></div></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX fyyQSt cdsFTG"><section id="217f2a7fbb07" class="sc-8960526-0 hktVrm"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF" width="100%"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-flUrZP sc-99a47be6-0 fIRjaX bxIUGr llHrbm"><div class="sc-hAqnzo fSMLOc"><p class="sc-579c22d1-4 sc-94e76d4b-0 bA-dJbf XDajr">Developers</p><h1 class="sc-579c22d1-2 sc-94e76d4b-1 bGKdIx jXwbls">Announcing Stellar X-Ray, Protocol 25</h1></div><div class="sc-hAqnzo sc-94e76d4b-2 hitExr gSSQkd"><figure width="100%" height="100%" class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-hxyrwO jJeuXN fIRjaX dKpNEv"><picture><source srcSet="data:image/png;base64,"/><img srcSet="data:image/png;base64," loading="eager" class="sc-xuTxv bCFiyR"/></picture></figure></div><div class="sc-hAqnzo sc-94e76d4b-4 cJLrxc kJtwul"><div class="sc-94e76d4b-6 dWYGiK"><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-4 eLhqkv bPMqN">Author</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-4 fnthtp bPMqN">Bri Wylde</p></div><div class="sc-94e76d4b-6 dWYGiK"><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-4 eLhqkv bPMqN">Publishing date</p><time dateTime="2025-11-24T00:00:00.000Z" class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-4 fnthtp bPMqN"></time></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX gISiLb cdsFTG"><section id="783de9326f0d" class="sc-8960526-0 hktVrm"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 sc-a236a696-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF jjrsBs" width="100%"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-3 emCDng"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-7 haqGDy"><div class="sc-577d91a0-3 erWDBq"><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">It’s about that time again — a new protocol upgrade is on the horizon for the Stellar network: X-Ray! This upgrade begins laying the groundwork for developers to build configurable, compliance-forward privacy applications using zero-knowledge (ZK) cryptography without compromising the transparency that defines Stellar.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">At Meridian 2025, Stellar Development Foundation’s (SDF) Chief Product Officer Tomer Weller outlined the long-term privacy strategy for Stellar (see the presentation <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j36W1LUGGrs" aria-label="here" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">here</span></span></a>). A core pillar of that strategy is a commitment to invest in critical privacy infrastructure and build the foundational cryptographic capabilities developers need before higher-level privacy solutions can exist.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">X-Ray — named after the everyday tool used to show only what needs to be seen and nothing more — represents the first major milestone in that plan. It proposes native support for two important primitives:</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"></p><ul class="sc-577d91a0-14 A-dlFY"><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl"><strong class="sc-577d91a0-15 cByPxG">BN254</strong>, a widely used pairing-friendly elliptic curve, and</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl"><strong class="sc-577d91a0-15 cByPxG">Poseidon</strong>, a family of hash functions designed specifically for ZK proof systems</li></ul></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX gISiLb cdsFTG"><section id="766501955fdb" class="sc-8960526-0 hktVrm"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 sc-a236a696-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF jjrsBs" width="100%"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-3 emCDng"><h2 class="sc-579c22d1-1 gjILUk sc-e90eaf70-6 kmSstj">Protocol timeline</h2><div class="sc-e90eaf70-7 haqGDy"><div class="sc-577d91a0-3 erWDBq"><ul class="sc-577d91a0-14 A-dlFY"><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">Testnet vote: January 7, 2026</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">Mainnet vote: January 22, 2026</li></ul><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Follow progress and preparation instructions through the continuously updated <a aria-label="Protocol X-Ray Upgrade Guide" class="sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" href="https://stellar.org/blog/developers/stellar-x-ray-protocol-25-upgrade-guide"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">Protocol X-Ray Upgrade Guide</span></span></a>.</p></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX fyyQSt cdsFTG"><section id="d5159700c995" class="sc-8960526-0 hktVrm"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 sc-a236a696-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF jjrsBs" width="100%"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-3 emCDng"><p class="sc-579c22d1-4 bA-dJbf sc-e90eaf70-5 hkqWzD" as="p">What X-Ray introduces and why it matters</p><h2 class="sc-579c22d1-1 gjILUk sc-e90eaf70-6 kmSstj">BN254: connecting Stellar to the broader ZK ecosystem</h2><div class="sc-e90eaf70-7 haqGDy"><div class="sc-577d91a0-3 erWDBq"><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><a href="https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/core/cap-0074.md" aria-label="CAP-0074: Host functions for BN254" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">CAP-0074: Host functions for BN254</span></span></a> proposes adding native host functions that enable elliptic curve operations on BN254, the elliptic curve standard used across many well-known ZK applications, such as privacy pools, Lighter, Starknet, and ZK Email. While Stellar already supports BLS12-381, a newer pairing-friendly curve introduced in <a href="https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/core/cap-0059.md" aria-label="CAP-0059: Host functions for BLS12-381" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">CAP-0059: Host functions for BLS12-381</span></span></a>, BN254 remains the most widely used curve in today’s ZK ecosystem.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Without native Soroban support for BN-254, developers building ZK applications on Stellar have to either rewrite their applications for a different curve or maintain workarounds that add complexity and cost. CAP-0074 removes that friction by introducing <a href="https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/core/cap-0074.md#new-host-functions-introduced" aria-label="three host functions" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">three host functions</span></span></a>:</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"></p><ul class="sc-577d91a0-14 A-dlFY"><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">`bn254_g1_add`</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">`bn254_g1_mul`</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">`bn254_multi_pairing_check`</li></ul><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">These functions enable efficient on-chain verification of zk-SNARK proofs, provide feature parity with Ethereum’s <a href="https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-196" aria-label="EIP-196" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">EIP-196</span></span></a> and <a href="https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-197" aria-label="EIP-197" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">EIP-197</span></span></a> precompiles, and make Stellar interoperable with existing ZK tooling and libraries. That means builders currently in EVM environments can easily migrate or extend projects to Stellar.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Supporting both BN254 and BLS12-381 helps enable configurable privacy on Stellar by giving developers the flexibility to choose the curve that best suits their goals.</p></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX fyyQSt cdsFTG"><section id="0e0de74e4e0d" class="sc-8960526-0 hktVrm"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 sc-a236a696-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF jjrsBs" width="100%"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-3 emCDng"><p class="sc-579c22d1-4 bA-dJbf sc-e90eaf70-5 hkqWzD" as="p">What X-Ray introduces and why it matters</p><h2 class="sc-579c22d1-1 gjILUk sc-e90eaf70-6 kmSstj">Poseidon and Poseidon2: hash functions designed for ZK systems</h2><div class="sc-e90eaf70-7 haqGDy"><div class="sc-577d91a0-3 erWDBq"><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">While BN254 provides the pairing operations for proof verification, you also need an efficient cryptographic hash, which is where Poseidon comes in.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><a href="https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/core/cap-0075.md" aria-label="CAP-0075: Cryptographic Primitives for Poseidon/Poseidon2 Hash Functions" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">CAP-0075: Cryptographic Primitives for Poseidon/Poseidon2 Hash Functions</span></span></a> defines host functions that expose the core permutation primitives behind Poseidon and Poseidon2.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">These primitives let developers design hash functions that are highly efficient in ZK circuits, addressing a key performance bottleneck in ZK systems. Traditional hashes like SHA-256 are computationally expensive to model within proofs, making Poseidon and Poseidon2 better suited for ZK-friendly applications.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">With native Poseidon primitives available:</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"></p><ul class="sc-577d91a0-14 A-dlFY"><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">Proofs can be generated with fewer constraints</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">Applications avoid the expensive onchain reimplementation of hashing logic</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">Developers can maintain consistent hash logic both onchain and offchain</li></ul></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX fyyQSt cdsFTG"><section id="b643dfa7894d" class="sc-8960526-0 hktVrm"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 sc-a236a696-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF jjrsBs" width="100%"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-3 emCDng"><h2 class="sc-579c22d1-1 gjILUk sc-e90eaf70-6 kmSstj">Why this matters</h2><div class="sc-e90eaf70-7 haqGDy"><div class="sc-577d91a0-3 erWDBq"><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Together, CAP-0074 and CAP-0075 establish the cryptographic foundation developers need to build privacy-preserving applications on Stellar without compromising transparency. <em class="sc-577d91a0-16 dIIeyU"><br/><br/></em>These capabilities unlock:</p><ul class="sc-577d91a0-14 A-dlFY"><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">Smooth migration of existing ZK applications</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">More efficient proof systems</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">Lower cost for ZK-based contracts</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">A bridge to the broader ZK ecosystem</li></ul></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX gISiLb cdsFTG"><section id="0ffac855db91"
