type="application/json">{"props":{"pageProps":{"preventIndexing":false,"_createdAt":"2025-11-21T17:08:11Z","_id":"a8c5e8ba-87b0-4740-a418-b71846bcbb96","_rev":"m7X6KwDZ0lnqby261I4c07","_system":{"base":{"id":"a8c5e8ba-87b0-4740-a418-b71846bcbb96","rev":"eFYiudFWWwFQw2LuG0OHCq"}},"_type":"blogPage","_updatedAt":"2025-11-24T17:21:39Z","author":"Bri Wylde","blogType":"Developers","content":[{"_key":"783de9326f0d","_type":"oneColumnHtmlSection","backgroundImage":{"blur":false,"image":null,"scrim":false},"body":[{"_key":"475ca76f21db","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"91f0e1a47823","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"It’s about that time again — a new protocol upgrade is on the horizon for the Stellar network: X-Ray! This upgrade begins laying the groundwork for developers to build configurable, compliance-forward privacy applications using zero-knowledge (ZK) cryptography without compromising the transparency that defines Stellar."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"3860a8692d57","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"8ca9386571e1","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":""}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"d0ab2512938d","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"6b330386c847","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"At Meridian 2025, Stellar Development Foundation’s (SDF) Chief Product Officer Tomer Weller outlined the long-term privacy strategy for Stellar (see the presentation "},{"_key":"161a3dd88f5f","_type":"span","marks":["9d79ebb4de1c"],"text":"here"},{"_key":"8bcb7cf237cd","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"). A core pillar of that strategy is a commitment to invest in critical privacy infrastructure and build the foundational cryptographic capabilities developers need before higher-level privacy solutions can exist."}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"9d79ebb4de1c","_type":"link","href":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j36W1LUGGrs"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"c645fb0f0572","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"3a6caaec0ab2","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":""}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"0e9bbf9f5e37","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"f93372d89fce","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"X-Ray — named after the everyday tool used to show only what needs to be seen and nothing more — represents the first major milestone in that plan. It proposes native support for two important primitives:"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"9f3edd7e6638","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"29f0a9927642","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":""}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"0eeacfd5384b","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"3aab5d31c6d4","_type":"span","marks":["strong"],"text":"BN254"},{"_key":"4c81e3c7ba33","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":", a widely used pairing-friendly elliptic curve, and"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"b95b2baae430","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"7cc4d1bc0222","_type":"span","marks":["strong"],"text":"Poseidon"},{"_key":"6eb1d553dedd","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":", a family of hash functions designed specifically for ZK proof systems"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"}],"ctas":null,"eventPageLumaEvent":null,"hasBackgroundImage":false,"showHostedBy":null,"slug":null,"theme":"lightTheme"},{"_key":"766501955fdb","_type":"oneColumnHtmlSection","backgroundImage":{"blur":false,"image":null,"scrim":false},"body":[{"_key":"ec2e88a480cd","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"774a6db98b24","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Testnet vote: January 7, 2026"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"86af359d251d","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"e56c79070cff","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Mainnet vote: January 22, 2026"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"e57aff5b9c74","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"10660ca4a56e","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Follow progress and preparation instructions through the continuously updated "},{"_key":"8803f9f455e2","_type":"span","marks":["73e3c7c77768"],"text":"Protocol X-Ray Upgrade Guide"},{"_key":"8e5cb8ae086f","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"."}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"73e3c7c77768","_type":"link","href":"https://stellar.org/blog/developers/stellar-x-ray-protocol-25-upgrade-guide"}],"style":"normal"}],"ctas":null,"eventPageLumaEvent":null,"hasBackgroundImage":false,"showHostedBy":null,"slug":null,"theme":"lightTheme","title":"Protocol timeline"},{"_key":"d5159700c995","_type":"oneColumnHtmlSection","backgroundImage":{"blur":false,"image":null,"scrim":false},"body":[{"_key":"fab30d57857a","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"4ae264b35642","_type":"span","marks":["f4088e509a97"],"text":"CAP-0074: Host functions for BN254"},{"_key":"2f96251421f2","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":" proposes adding native host functions that enable elliptic curve operations on BN254, the elliptic curve standard used across many well-known ZK applications, such as privacy pools, Lighter, Starknet, and ZK Email. While Stellar already supports BLS12-381, a newer pairing-friendly curve introduced in "},{"_key":"fa1f76fca35c","_type":"span","marks":["a51357c324bc"],"text":"CAP-0059: Host functions for BLS12-381"},{"_key":"c0b792976a8f","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":", BN254 remains the most widely used curve in today’s ZK ecosystem."}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"f4088e509a97","_type":"link","href":"https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/core/cap-0074.md"},{"_key":"a51357c324bc","_type":"link","href":"https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/core/cap-0059.md"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"e2b6ca5efa3f","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"84ad8185cb13","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":""}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"cef19a426bb4","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"b940aa9800a2","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Without native Soroban support for BN-254, developers building ZK applications on Stellar have to either rewrite their applications for a different curve or maintain workarounds that add complexity and cost. CAP-0074 removes that friction by introducing "},{"_key":"e12a1cc7fbf8","_type":"span","marks":["d81c15e8cd5f"],"text":"three host functions"},{"_key":"2be8e8ffc510","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":":"}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"d81c15e8cd5f","_type":"link","href":"https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/core/cap-0074.md#new-host-functions-introduced"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"576a14ee5069","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"fec009dd2d8f","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":""}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"587f897cfe73","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"5af518dab50a","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"`bn254_g1_add`"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"70e5cffc61e8","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"c778ab194328","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"`bn254_g1_mul`"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"8400ec835873","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"1c667d90ec1e","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"`bn254_multi_pairing_check`"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"05e44f11137b","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"545ebdd481bc","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":""}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"d50f98f51e06","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"b9c94d972c60","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"These functions enable efficient on-chain verification of zk-SNARK proofs, provide feature parity with Ethereum’s "},{"_key":"4c8a36bc1313","_type":"span","marks":["0a7b3d804b25"],"text":"EIP-196"},{"_key":"a5d9a6be6d9d","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":" and "},{"_key":"7194c18d11a7","_type":"span","marks":["8f306e40f1b4"],"text":"EIP-197"},{"_key":"1179f2d825a2","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":" precompiles, and make Stellar interoperable with existing ZK tooling and libraries. That means builders currently in EVM environments can easily migrate or extend projects to Stellar."}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"0a7b3d804b25","_type":"link","href":"https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-196"},{"_key":"8f306e40f1b4","_type":"link","href":"https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-197"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"4688b2295faf","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"ea9e59a68e88","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":""}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"7e194dfbe588","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"275b874322bc","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Supporting both BN254 and BLS12-381 helps enable configurable privacy on Stellar by giving developers the flexibility to choose the curve that best suits their goals."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"}],"ctas":null,"eventPageLumaEvent":null,"hasBackgroundImage":false,"showHostedBy":null,"slug":null,"subtitle":"What X-Ray introduces and why it matters","theme":"greyTheme","title":"BN254: connecting Stellar to the broader ZK ecosystem"},{"_key":"0e0de74e4e0d","_type":"oneColumnHtmlSection","backgroundImage":{"blur":false,"image":null,"scrim":false},"body":[{"_key":"3e724b153e6a","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"8ad059010ffa","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"While BN254 provides the pairing operations for proof verification, you also need an efficient cryptographic hash, which is where Poseidon comes in."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"66e652621df6","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"9e195a21c3a5","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":""}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"10f2d78cf686","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"bc96a073b9c6","_type":"span","marks":["13c02e79bb8d"],"text":"CAP-0075: Cryptographic Primitives for Poseidon/Poseidon2 Hash Functions"},{"_key":"6dba6c00b6dc","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":" defines host functions that expose the core permutation primitives behind Poseidon and Poseidon2."}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"13c02e79bb8d","_type":"link","href":"https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/core/cap-0075.md"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"b359ab6ee82f","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"eb27fe03e025","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":""}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"b23c759bf7df","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"6b9826f1bfba","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"These primitives let developers design hash functions that are highly efficient in ZK circuits, addressing a key performance bottleneck in ZK systems. Traditional hashes like SHA-256 are computationally expensive to model within proofs, making Poseidon and Poseidon2 better suited for ZK-friendly applications."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"222727b85aeb","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"a312cb868363","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":""}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"62905d138226","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"06b4c46b30cb","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"With native Poseidon primitives available:"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"332a328b0f65","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"eeb6c1b35085","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":""}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"481c20e78c70","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"b9ae9ab61bc8","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Proofs can be generated with fewer constraints"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"400724d1e9bc","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"8d208fe62c88","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Applications avoid the expensive onchain reimplementation of hashing logic"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"5e1a2062b5ee","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"a7196d68491c","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Developers can maintain consistent hash logic both onchain and offchain"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"}],"ctas":null,"eventPageLumaEvent":null,"hasBackgroundImage":false,"showHostedBy":null,"slug":null,"subtitle":"What X-Ray introduces and why it matters","theme":"greyTheme","title":"Poseidon and Poseidon2: hash functions designed for ZK systems"},{"_key":"b643dfa7894d","_type":"oneColumnHtmlSection","backgroundImage":{"blur":false,"image":null,"scrim":false},"body":[{"_key":"c33f10496c9a","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"4e2614478c77","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Together, CAP-0074 and CAP-0075 establish the cryptographic foundation developers need to build privacy-preserving applications on Stellar without compromising transparency. .hs-form{font-family:"Inter",sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:0.75rem;line-height:1.5rem;color:#0f0f0f;overflow:hidden;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form >.hs-form-field,.hs-form >.legal-consent-container{margin-block:var(--spacing-responsive-md);}/*!sc*/

@media screen and (min-width: 768px){.hs-form .hs-richtext{margin:0.5rem 0;}}/*!sc*/
.hs-form label.hs-error-msg{color:#ff3f00;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form .form-columns-1,.hs-form .form-columns-2,.hs-form .form-columns-3{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;gap:1.5rem;}/*!sc*/

@media screen and (min-width: 0px){.hs-form .form-columns-1 >div,.hs-form .form-columns-2 >div,.hs-form .form-columns-3 >div{margin:0.5rem 0;}}/*!sc*/
@media screen and (min-width: 768px){.hs-form .form-columns-1 >div,.hs-form .form-columns-2 >div,.hs-form .form-columns-3 >div{margin:2rem 0;}}/*!sc*/
@media screen and (min-width: 0px){.hs-form .form-columns-1,.hs-form .form-columns-2,.hs-form .form-columns-3{-webkit-flex-direction:column;-ms-flex-direction:column;flex-direction:column;margin:-0.5rem 0;gap:0rem;}}/*!sc*/
@media screen and (min-width: 768px){.hs-form .form-columns-1,.hs-form .form-columns-2,.hs-form .form-columns-3{-webkit-flex-direction:row;-ms-flex-direction:row;flex-direction:row;margin:-1rem 0;gap:1.5rem;}}/*!sc*/
@media screen and (min-width: 0px){.hs-form .hs_recaptcha{margin:1rem 0;}}/*!sc*/
@media screen and (min-width: 768px){.hs-form .hs_recaptcha{margin:2rem 0;}}/*!sc*/
.hs-form .input{line-height:0;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="text"],.hs-form input[type="tel"],.hs-form input[type="email"],.hs-form input[type="number"],.hs-form textarea,.hs-form select{font-family:"Inter",sans-serif;border:1px solid #969696;width:100%;border-radius:1.5rem;padding:0.625rem 1.5rem;margin-top:0.25rem;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="text"]:hover,.hs-form input[type="tel"]:hover,.hs-form input[type="email"]:hover,.hs-form input[type="number"]:hover,.hs-form textarea:hover,.hs-form select:hover{background-color:#f9f9f9;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="text"]:focus,.hs-form input[type="tel"]:focus,.hs-form input[type="email"]:focus,.hs-form input[type="number"]:focus,.hs-form textarea:focus,.hs-form select:focus{border-color:#0f0f0f;color:#0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="submit"]{background-color:#0f0f0f;font-size:1rem;color:#ffffff;padding:0.375rem 1.375rem;line-height:1.75rem;border:1px solid #0f0f0f;border-radius:6.25rem;font-weight:400;cursor:pointer;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]{cursor:pointer;width:1.5rem;height:1.5rem;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]:hover{border:1px solid #0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]:checked::before{background-color:#fdda24;border:6px solid #0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]::before{content:"";display:inline-block;width:1.5rem;height:1.5rem;margin-right:0.5rem;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid #969696;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form input[type="radio"]::before:hover{background-color:#f9f9f9;}/*!sc*/
.hs-field-desc{font-weight:400;font-size:0.75rem;line-height:2;margin:0.5rem 0;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox,.hs-form-booleancheckbox,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:flex-end;-webkit-box-align:flex-end;-ms-flex-align:flex-end;align-items:flex-end;-webkit-box-pack:start;-ms-flex-pack:start;-webkit-justify-content:flex-start;justify-content:flex-start;-webkit-box-flex-wrap:nowrap;-webkit-flex-wrap:nowrap;-ms-flex-wrap:nowrap;flex-wrap:nowrap;font-weight:400;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"],.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"],.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]{-webkit-appearance:none;-moz-appearance:none;-ms-appearance:none;appearance:none;width:1.5rem;height:1.5rem;border:1px solid #969696;border-radius:0.25rem;background-repeat:no-repeat;-webkit-background-position:center;background-position:center;cursor:pointer;font-weight:400;min-width:1.5rem;margin:0;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:hover{background-color:#f2f2f2;border:1 solid #0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:hover:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:hover:checked,.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:checked{border:1 solid #0f0f0f;background-color:#0f0f0f;background-image:url('/images/check-yellow.svg');}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox input[type="checkbox"]:checked:hover,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display input[type="checkbox"]:checked:hover{border:1 solid #0f0f0f;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox span,.hs-form-booleancheckbox span,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display span{font-size:0.75rem;line-height:1.5rem;display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;-webkit-box-pack:center;-ms-flex-pack:center;-webkit-justify-content:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:400;-webkit-flex-basis:fit-content;-ms-flex-preferred-size:fit-content;flex-basis:fit-content;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-checkbox label,.hs-form-booleancheckbox label,.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display label{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:flex-start;-webkit-box-align:flex-start;-ms-flex-align:flex-start;align-items:flex-start;margin:0.5rem 0;gap:0.5rem;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-booleancheckbox-display span{display:inline;}/*!sc*/
.hs-fieldtype-select select{-webkit-appearance:none;-moz-appearance:none;-ms-appearance:none;appearance:none;padding-right:2rem;}/*!sc*/
.hs-fieldtype-select .input{display:inline-block;width:100%;position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.hs-fieldtype-select .input:after{content:"";position:absolute;top:1rem;right:1rem;width:1rem;height:1rem;background-image:url(/images/chevron-down.svg);background-repeat:no-repeat;-webkit-background-position:center;background-position:center;pointer-events:none;cursor:pointer;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-radio{margin:0.5rem 0;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-radio span{font-size:0.75rem;line-height:1.5rem;display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;-webkit-box-pack:center;-ms-flex-pack:center;-webkit-justify-content:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:400;-webkit-flex-basis:fit-content;-ms-flex-preferred-size:fit-content;flex-basis:fit-content;color:#000;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-radio label{display:-webkit-box;display:-webkit-flex;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;gap:0.5rem;-webkit-align-items:center;-webkit-box-align:center;-ms-flex-align:center;align-items:center;}/*!sc*/
.hs-form-radio input{margin:0;width:1rem;height:1rem;}/*!sc*/
input[type=file]{margin-top:0.5rem;}/*!sc*/
.hs_error_rollup{border:0.125rem solid #ff3f00;border-radius:0.125rem;line-height:2rem;padding:0.75rem 1.5rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem;}/*!sc*/

:root{--mono-1:#f9f9f9;--mono-2:#00a7b5;--mono-3:#969696;--hue-1:#fdda24;--hue-2:#00a7b5;--hue-3:#b7ace8;--hue-4:#fdda24;--hue-5:#00a7b5;--hue-5-2:rgba(0, 167, 181, 0.8);--hue-6:#00a7b5;--syntax-fg:#b7ace8;--syntax-bg:#262626;--syntax-gutter:rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);--syntax-guide:rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);--syntax-selection-color:rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);--syntax-gutter-background-color-selected:#262626;--syntax-cursor-line:#ffffff;}/*!sc*/
code[class*="language-"],pre[class*="language-"]{background:var(--syntax-bg);color:var(--mono-1);direction:ltr;text-align:left;white-space:pre;word-spacing:normal;word-break:normal;font-size:0.875rem;line-height:1.125rem;-moz-tab-size:2;-o-tab-size:2;-moz-tab-size:2;tab-size:2;-webkit-hyphens:none;-moz-hyphens:none;-ms-hyphens:none;-webkit-hyphens:none;-moz-hyphens:none;-ms-hyphens:none;hyphens:none;}/*!sc*/
code[class*="language-"]::-moz-selection,code[class*="language-"] *::-moz-selection,pre[class*="language-"] *::-moz-selection{background:var(--syntax-selection-color);color:inherit;text-shadow:none;}/*!sc*/
code[class*="language-"]::selection,code[class*="language-"] *::selection,pre[class*="language-"] *::selection{background:var(--syntax-selection-color);color:inherit;text-shadow:none;}/*!sc*/
pre[class*="language-"]{padding:1em;margin:0.5em 0;overflow:auto;border-radius:0.3em;}/*!sc*/
:not(pre)>code[class*="language-"]{padding:0.2em 0.3em;border-radius:0.3em;white-space:normal;}/*!sc*/
@media print{code[class*="language-"],pre[class*="language-"]{text-shadow:none;}}/*!sc*/
.token.comment,.token.prolog,.token.cdata{color:var(--mono-3);}/*!sc*/
.token.doctype,.token.punctuation,.token.entity{color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.token.attr-name,.token.class-name,.token.boolean,.token.constant,.token.number,.token.atrule{color:var(--hue-6);}/*!sc*/
.token.keyword{color:var(--hue-3);}/*!sc*/
.token.property,.token.tag,.token.symbol,.token.deleted,.token.important{color:var(--hue-5);}/*!sc*/
.token.selector,.token.string,.token.char,.token.builtin,.token.inserted,.token.regex,.token.attr-value,.token.attr-value>.token.punctuation{color:var(--hue-4);}/*!sc*/
.token.variable,.token.operator,.token.function{color:var(--hue-2);}/*!sc*/
.token.url{color:var(--hue-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-rust .token.attr-name{color:var(--hue-4);}/*!sc*/
.token.attr-value>.token.punctuation.attr-equals,.token.special-attr>.token.attr-value>.token.value.css{color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-css .token.selector{color:var(--hue-5);}/*!sc*/
.language-css .token.property{color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-css .token.function,.language-css .token.url>.token.function{color:var(--hue-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-css .token.url>.token.string.url{color:var(--hue-4);}/*!sc*/
.language-css .token.important,.language-css .token.atrule .token.rule{color:var(--hue-3);}/*!sc*/
.language-javascript .token.operator{color:var(--hue-3);}/*!sc*/
.language-javascript .token.template-string>.token.interpolation>.token.interpolation-punctuation.punctuation{color:var(--hue-5-2);}/*!sc*/
.language-json .token.operator{color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-json .token.property{color:var(--hue-3);}/*!sc*/
.language-json .token.null.keyword{color:var(--hue-6);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.url,.language-markdown .token.url>.token.operator,.language-markdown .token.url-reference.url>.token.string{color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.url>.token.content{color:var(--hue-2);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.url>.token.url,.language-markdown .token.url-reference.url{color:var(--hue-1);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.blockquote.punctuation,.language-markdown .token.hr.punctuation{color:var(--mono-3);font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.code-snippet{color:var(--hue-4);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.bold .token.content{color:var(--hue-6);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.italic .token.content{color:var(--hue-3);}/*!sc*/
.language-markdown .token.strike .token.content,.language-markdown .token.strike .token.punctuation,.language-markdown .token.list.punctuation,.language-markdown .token.title.important>.token.punctuation{color:var(--hue-5);}/*!sc*/
.token.bold{font-weight:bold;}/*!sc*/
.token.italic{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.token.entity{cursor:help;}/*!sc*/
.token.namespace{opacity:0.8;}/*!sc*/
.token.token.tab:not(:empty):before,.token.token.cr:before,.token.token.lf:before,.token.token.space:before{color:var(--syntax-guide);text-shadow:none;}/*!sc*/
div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item{margin-right:0.4em;}/*!sc*/
div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>button,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>a,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>span{background:var(--syntax-gutter-background-color-selected);color:var(--mono-2);padding:0.5em 1em;border-radius:0.3em;cursor:pointer;}/*!sc*/
div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>button:hover,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>button:focus,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>a:hover,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>a:focus,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>span:hover,div.code-toolbar>.toolbar.toolbar>.toolbar-item>span:focus{background:var(--syntax-selection-color);color:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.line-highlight.line-highlight{background:var(--syntax-cursor-line);}/*!sc*/
.line-highlight.line-highlight:before,.line-highlight.line-highlight[data-end]:after{background:var(--syntax-gutter-background-color-selected);color:var(--mono-1);padding:0.1em 0.6em;border-radius:0.3em;box-shadow:0 2px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2);}/*!sc*/
pre[id].linkable-line-numbers.linkable-line-numbers span.line-numbers-rows>span:hover:before{background-color:var(--syntax-cursor-line);}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers.line-numbers .line-numbers-rows,.command-line .command-line-prompt{border-right-color:var(--syntax-guide);}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers .line-numbers-rows>span:before,.command-line .command-line-prompt>span:before{color:var(--syntax-gutter);}/*!sc*/

.prism-previewer.prism-previewer:before,.prism-previewer-gradient.prism-previewer-gradient div{border-color:hsl(224,13%,17%);}/*!sc*/
.prism-previewer-color.prism-previewer-color:before,.prism-previewer-gradient.prism-previewer-gradient div,.prism-previewer-easing.prism-previewer-easing:before{border-radius:0.3em;}/*!sc*/
.prism-previewer.prism-previewer:after{border-top-color:hsl(224,13%,17%);}/*!sc*/
.prism-previewer-flipped.prism-previewer-flipped.after{border-bottom-color:hsl(224,13%,17%);}/*!sc*/
.prism-previewer-angle.prism-previewer-angle:before,.prism-previewer-time.prism-previewer-time:before,.prism-previewer-easing.prism-previewer-easing{background:hsl(219,13%,22%);}/*!sc*/
.prism-previewer-angle.prism-previewer-angle circle,.prism-previewer-time.prism-previewer-time circle{stroke:var(--mono-1);stroke-opacity:1;}/*!sc*/
.prism-previewer-easing.prism-previewer-easing circle,.prism-previewer-easing.prism-previewer-easing path,.prism-previewer-easing.prism-previewer-easing line{stroke:var(--mono-1);}/*!sc*/
.prism-previewer-easing.prism-previewer-easing circle{fill:transparent;}/*!sc*/
pre[class*="language-"].line-numbers{position:relative;padding-left:3.8em;counter-reset:linenumber;}/*!sc*/
pre[class*="language-"].line-numbers>code{position:relative;white-space:inherit;}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers .line-numbers-rows{position:absolute;pointer-events:none;top:0;font-size:100%;left:-3.8em;width:3em;letter-spacing:-1px;border-right:1px solid;-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-ms-user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-ms-user-select:none;user-select:none;}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers-rows>span{display:block;counter-increment:linenumber;}/*!sc*/
.line-numbers-rows>span:before{content:counter(linenumber);color:red;display:block;padding-right:0.8em;text-align:right;}/*!sc*/
data-styled.g135[id="sc-global-eMkfHm1"]{content:"sc-global-eMkfHm1,"}/*!sc*/
.katex{font-family:'lora','lora Fallback',serif;line-height:1.2;text-indent:0;text-rendering:auto;font-size:1.5rem;}/*!sc*/
.katex *{-ms-high-contrast-adjust:none!important;}/*!sc*/
.katex *{border-color:currentColor;}/*!sc*/
.katex .katex-version::after{content:"0.16.8";}/*!sc*/
.katex .katex-mathml{position:absolute;clip:rect(1px,1px,1px,1px);padding:0;border:0;height:1px;width:1px;overflow:hidden;}/*!sc*/
.katex .katex-html>.newline{display:block;}/*!sc*/
.katex .base{position:relative;display:inline-block;white-space:nowrap;width:-webkit-min-content;width:-moz-min-content;width:-webkit-min-content;width:-moz-min-content;width:min-content;}/*!sc*/
.katex .strut{display:inline-block;}/*!sc*/
.katex .textbf{font-weight:bold;}/*!sc*/
.katex .textit{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathnormal{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathit{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathrm{font-style:normal;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathbf{font-weight:bold;}/*!sc*/
.katex .boldsymbol{font-weight:bold;font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathboldsf,.katex .textboldsf{font-weight:bold;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mathitsf,.katex .textitsf{font-style:italic;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mainrm{font-style:normal;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist-t{display:inline-table;table-layout:fixed;border-collapse:collapse;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist-r{display:table-row;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist{display:table-cell;vertical-align:bottom;position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist>span{display:block;height:0;position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist>span>span{display:inline-block;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist>span>.pstrut{overflow:hidden;width:0;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist-t2{margin-right:-2px;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vlist-s{display:table-cell;vertical-align:bottom;font-size:1px;width:2px;min-width:2px;}/*!sc*/
.katex .vbox{display:-webkit-inline-box;display:-webkit-inline-flex;display:-ms-inline-flexbox;display:inline-flex;-webkit-flex-direction:column;-ms-flex-direction:column;flex-direction:column;-webkit-align-items:baseline;-webkit-box-align:baseline;-ms-flex-align:baseline;align-items:baseline;}/*!sc*/
.katex .hbox{display:-webkit-inline-box;display:-webkit-inline-flex;display:-ms-inline-flexbox;display:inline-flex;-webkit-flex-direction:row;-ms-flex-direction:row;flex-direction:row;width:100%;}/*!sc*/
.katex .thinbox{display:-webkit-inline-box;display:-webkit-inline-flex;display:-ms-inline-flexbox;display:inline-flex;-webkit-flex-direction:row;-ms-flex-direction:row;flex-direction:row;width:0;max-width:0;}/*!sc*/
.katex .msupsub{text-align:left;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mfrac>span>span{text-align:center;}/*!sc*/
.katex .mfrac .frac-line{display:inline-block;width:100%;border-bottom-style:solid;}/*!sc*/

.katex .mspace{display:inline-block;}/*!sc*/
.katex .llap,.katex .rlap,.katex .clap{width:0;position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.katex .llap>.inner,.katex .rlap>.inner,.katex .clap>.inner{position:absolute;}/*!sc*/
.katex .llap>.fix,.katex .rlap>.fix,.katex .clap>.fix{display:inline-block;}/*!sc*/
.katex .llap>.inner{right:0;}/*!sc*/
.katex .rlap>.inner,.katex .clap>.inner{left:0;}/*!sc*/
.katex .clap>.inner>span{margin-left:-50%;margin-right:50%;}/*!sc*/
.katex .rule{display:inline-block;border:solid 0;position:relative;}/*!sc*/
.katex .overline .overline-line,.katex .underline .underline-line,.katex .hline{display:inline-block;width:100%;border-bottom-style:solid;}/*!sc*/
.katex .hdashline{display:inline-block;width:100%;border-bottom-style:dashed;}/*!sc*/

bPMqN">Publishing date</p><time dateTime="2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z" class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-4 elUAL bPMqN"></time></div><div class="sc-94e76d4b-6 gSEQgI"><div class="sc-94e76d4b-5 gfnMuN"></div></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX gISiLb cdsFTG"><section id="6bba06866ac7" class="sc-8960526-0 hktVrm"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 sc-a236a696-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF jjrsBs" width="100%"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-3 emCDng"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-7 haqGDy"><div class="sc-577d91a0-3 erWDBq"><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">This guide is designed to help businesses and developers prepare for Yardstick, Protocol 26, with key dates, release information, a changelog, and more.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Stay up to date on any and all Yardstick-related announcements on the Stellar Developer Discord, where the ecosystem coordinates and shares information about the upgrade.</p><h3 class="sc-579c22d1-2 sc-577d91a0-6 bGKdIx xVexH">Key dates</h3><ul class="sc-577d91a0-14 A-dlFY"><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">April 8, 2026: Stable releases available.</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">April 16, 2026, 1700 UTC: Testnet upgrade.</li><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl">May 6, 2026, 1700 UTC: Mainnet upgrade vote.</li></ul></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX gISiLb cdsFTG"><section id="53ef14eed3a2" class="sc-8960526-0 hktVrm"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 sc-a236a696-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF jjrsBs" width="100%"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-3 emCDng"><h2 class="sc-579c22d1-1 gjILUk sc-e90eaf70-6 kmSstj">What do you need to do to prepare?</h2><div class="sc-e90eaf70-7 haqGDy"><div class="sc-577d91a0-3 erWDBq"><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><strong class="sc-577d91a0-15 cByPxG">If you use a Stellar SDK</strong></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">For your Testnet integration, upgrade to the latest version of the relevant Stellar SDK before April 16, 2026. For your Mainnet integration, upgrade to the latest version of relevant Stellar SDKs before May 6, 2026.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><strong class="sc-577d91a0-15 cByPxG">If you run Stellar infrastructure (Stellar Core, Horizon, RPC, Galexie)</strong></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Install Protocol 26 releases after they are available April 8, 2026. If you use Docker images, pull the Protocol 26 builds from the Docker registry. If you build from source or our Debian packages, make sure to also update your stellar-core, stellar-horizon, and stellar-rpc binaries to the Protocol 26 builds.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><em class="sc-577d91a0-16 dIIeyU">Ubuntu</em></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">By April 8, 2026, we will publish images for Ubuntu 24.04 and Ubuntu 22.04. To build from source you can refer to the Installation Instructions for installation steps. Package-based installation is also described in the Stellar documentation.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><em class="sc-577d91a0-16 dIIeyU">Docker</em></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">By April 8, 2026, we will publish the Stellar Core Docker images for Protocol 26, and the Docker-based installation is also described in the Stellar documentation.</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><strong class="sc-577d91a0-15 cByPxG">If you run a validator</strong></p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">The Protocol 26 upgrade vote is scheduled for May 6, 2026. You should arm your validator with the following command:</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit"><code class="sc-d518ad1e-0 dawOoM language-markup">upgrades?mode=set&amp;upgradetime=2026-05-06T17:00:00Z&amp;protocolversion=26</code></p></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX gISiLb cdsFTG"><section id="d356b656a8f9" class="sc-8960526-0 hktVrm"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 sc-a236a696-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF jjrsBs" width="100%"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-3 emCDng"><h2 class="sc-579c22d1-1 gjILUk sc-e90eaf70-6 kmSstj">Protocol 26 releases</h2><div class="sc-e90eaf70-7 haqGDy"><div class="sc-577d91a0-3 erWDBq"><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Below are up-to-date links to all available releases relevant to Protocol 26. These releases should be available by April 8, 2026. In general, please make sure to check release notes for specific instructions and requirements, and unless otherwise indicated, opt for the “Latest Release.”</p><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Stellar infrastructure</p><ul class="sc-577d91a0-14 A-dlFY"><li class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-10 cafwrl"><a date on any and all Yardstick-related announcements, join the <a href="https://discord.gg/sp8zfb4qH6" aria-label="Stellar Developer Discord" class="sc-gJhJfT irqYQk sc-fpSqyW sc-3f996000-5 bVxYjp jGieIs" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><span class="sc-3f996000-6 eKbMIk"><span class="sc-3f996000-0 cDlpCt">Stellar Developer Discord</span></span></a>, where the ecosystem coordinates and shares information about the upgrade in the #protocol-next channel.</p></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX gISiLb cdsFTG"><section id="0f3b0a92c7dd" class="sc-8960526-0 hktVrm"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 sc-a236a696-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF jjrsBs" width="100%"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-3 emCDng"><h2 class="sc-579c22d1-1 gjILUk sc-e90eaf70-6 kmSstj">What’s New in Yardstick</h2><div class="sc-e90eaf70-7 haqGDy"><div class="sc-577d91a0-3 erWDBq"><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">The following is a brief summary of what’s included in Protocol 26.</p><h5 class="sc-579c22d1-4 sc-577d91a0-8 bA-dJbf iwBGSt"><strong class="sc-577d91a0-15 cByPxG">Freezing compromised ledger entries (CAP-0077)</strong></h5><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Introduces protocol-level configuration settings that let validators, through consensus, maintain a list of frozen ledger keys. When a key is frozen, Soroban transactions that would touch it are rejected, and affected classic offers are pulled from the order book. An allow-list of explicitly permitted transactions can bypass the freeze when needed. This is a direct response to incidents and gives the network a consensus-driven, onchain tool to quarantine compromised entries without improvising.</p><h5 class="sc-579c22d1-4 sc-577d91a0-8 bA-dJbf iwBGSt"><strong class="sc-577d91a0-15 cByPxG">Checked 256-bit integer arithmetic (CAP-0082)</strong></h5><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Adds checked variants of 256-bit integer host functions (for both unsigned and signed types: add, subtract, multiply, and power) that return Void on overflow rather than trapping. Contracts can inspect the return value and handle overflow by design instead of crashing. Useful for financial logic involving large numbers.</p><h5 class="sc-579c22d1-4 sc-577d91a0-8 bA-dJbf iwBGSt"><strong class="sc-577d91a0-15 cByPxG">Precise TTL control (CAP-0078)</strong></h5><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Introduces v2 TTL host functions with explicit extend_to, min_extension, and max_extension parameters. The host enforces network TTL limits and clamps or rejects extensions accordingly. Contracts can now tick state forward in precise increments, proportional to actual use, enabling equitable rent policies.</p><h5 class="sc-579c22d1-4 sc-577d91a0-8 bA-dJbf iwBGSt"><strong class="sc-577d91a0-15 cByPxG">Additional BN254 cryptographic host functions (CAP-0080)</strong></h5><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Builds on the BN254 work from X-Ray (Protocol 25). Adds nine new Soroban host functions: BN254 multi-scalar multiplication, scalar-field arithmetic (add, subtract, multiply, power, inverse), and curve-membership checks for both BLS12-381 and BN254 points. These move heavy ZK arithmetic into the host layer, making NoirLang proof verification significantly cheaper than Wasm-side implementations.</p><h5 class="sc-579c22d1-4 sc-577d91a0-8 bA-dJbf iwBGSt"><strong class="sc-577d91a0-15 cByPxG">SAC improvements (CAP-0073)</strong></h5><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Lets the Stellar Asset Contract create unlimited trustlines for G-accounts directly, mirroring ChangeTrustOp semantics but driven from Soroban. Also updates XLM SAC transfers to auto-create account entries when sending enough XLM to a new G-address, reducing the need to mix classic operations into Soroban flows.</p><h5 class="sc-579c22d1-4 sc-577d91a0-8 bA-dJbf iwBGSt"><strong class="sc-577d91a0-15 cByPxG">Strkey conversion with muxed account support (CAP-0079)</strong></h5><p class="sc-4251f05a-0 sc-4251f05a-3 fnthtp czmbPC sc-577d91a0-9 gSqEit">Adds strkey conversion host functions with first-class support for muxed accounts, allowing contracts to convert between G…/M…/C… strkeys and Address/MuxedAddress objects natively. Cross-chain protocols that already speak strkeys can work with muxed accounts without writing custom encoding logic.</p></div></div></div></div></section></div><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-dkiZCX sc-8960526-1 fIRjaX fyyQSt cdsFTG"><section id="d062078319da" class="sc-8960526-0 hktVrm"><div class="sc-iKTbCL sc-gnpauu sc-fLVvQH sc-320d54e1-0 sc-a236a696-0 jUhiFf fIRjaX cHQWYL evLKQF jjrsBs" width="100%"><div class="sc-e90eaf70-3 emCDng"><h2 class="sc-579c22d1-1 gjILUk sc-e90eaf70-6 kmSstj">Changelog</h2><div class="sc-e90eaf70-7 haqGDy"><div class="sc-577d91a0-3 erWDBq"><ul guide is designed to help businesses and developers prepare for Yardstick, Protocol 26, with key dates, release information, a changelog, and more."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"3ef7a89b9d5a","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"95d71065f508","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Stay up to date on any and all Yardstick-related available."}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"5525fa1693c3","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"9cf85d557629","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"April 16, 2026, 1700 UTC: Testnet upgrade."}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"6350520a4ebf","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"93e28f111ea8","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"May 6, 2026, 1700 UTC: Mainnet upgrade vote."}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"}],"ctas":null,"eventPageLumaEvent":null,"hasBackgroundImage":false,"showHostedBy":null,"slug":null,"theme":"lightTheme"},{"_key":"53ef14eed3a2","_type":"oneColumnHtmlSection","backgroundImage":{"blur":false,"image":null,"scrim":false},"body":[{"_key":"b0cee90eb304","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"55f0f492edf3","_type":"span","marks":["strong"],"text":"If you use a Stellar SDK"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"8e797776f4f3","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"443c56515d70","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"For your Testnet integration, upgrade to the latest version of the relevant Stellar SDK before April 16, 2026. For your Mainnet integration, upgrade to the latest version of relevant Stellar SDKs before May 6, 2026."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"69d79d711bd6","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"eb9c7f6e5327","_type":"span","marks":["strong"],"text":"If you run Stellar infrastructure (Stellar Core, Horizon, RPC, Galexie)"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"909624475b7a","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"4db0a5ba72a6","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Install Protocol 26 releases after they are available April 8, 2026. If you use Docker images, pull the Protocol 26 builds from the Docker registry. If you build from source or our Debian packages, make sure to also update your stellar-core, stellar-horizon, and stellar-rpc binaries to the Protocol 26 builds."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"4adc150a313d","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"d89e679a1dc9","_type":"span","marks":["em"],"text":"Ubuntu"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"eb1676365a47","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"8ede88bf92c3","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"By April 8, 2026, we will publish images for Ubuntu 24.04 and Ubuntu 22.04. To build from source you can refer to the Installation Instructions for installation steps. Package-based installation is also described in the Stellar documentation."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"6705dc408450","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"1b95d1c6142e","_type":"span","marks":["em"],"text":"Docker"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"d2d451ee092d","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"81dbdeadc4cf","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"By April 8, 2026, we will publish the Stellar Core Docker images for Protocol 26, and the Docker-based installation is also described in the Stellar documentation."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"342b0fee59f4","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"69551219bee0","_type":"span","marks":["strong"],"text":"If you run a validator"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"8efce4d73113","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"5056c91242e4","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"The Protocol 26 upgrade vote is scheduled for May 6, 2026. You should arm your validator with the following command:"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"38100f0fa946","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"52ca1047eef3","_type":"span","marks":["code"],"text":"upgrades?mode=set\u0026upgradetime=2026-05-06T17:00:00Z\u0026protocolversion=26"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"}],"ctas":null,"eventPageLumaEvent":null,"hasBackgroundImage":false,"showHostedBy":null,"slug":null,"theme":"lightTheme","title":"What do you need to do to prepare?"},{"_key":"d356b656a8f9","_type":"oneColumnHtmlSection","backgroundImage":{"blur":false,"image":null,"scrim":false},"body":[{"_key":"3c9ed4678fe8","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"1af5fb6026fc","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Below are up-to-date links to all available releases relevant to Protocol 26. These releases should be available by April 8, 2026. In general, please make sure to check release notes for specific instructions and requirements, and unless otherwise indicated, opt for the “Latest Release.”"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"5afb354b4357","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"ef8c00c1e308","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Stellar .NET"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[{"_key":"7930c648149f","_type":"link","href":"https://github.com/Beans-BV/dotnet-stellar-sdk"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"e0903242a678","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"4340e74faeef","_type":"span","marks":["811a19ee816d"],"text":"Flutter"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[{"_key":"811a19ee816d","_type":"link","href":"https://github.com/Soneso/stellar_flutter_sdk/releases"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"f0101432c16f","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"895452369ec4","_type":"span","marks":["509aec0dd3c0"],"text":"Elixir Stellar SDK"}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[{"_key":"509aec0dd3c0","_type":"link","href":"https://github.com/kommitters/stellar_sdk/releases"}],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"b52422d00530","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"4b3576f20df0","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"To stay up to date on any and all Yardstick-related announcements, join the "},{"_key":"f129ff5dfe8f","_type":"span","marks":["6a5058703878"],"text":"Stellar Developer Discord"},{"_key":"fd9076c66611","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":", where the ecosystem coordinates and shares information about the upgrade in the #protocol-next channel."}],"markDefs":[{"_key":"6a5058703878","_type":"link","href":"https://discord.gg/sp8zfb4qH6"}],"style":"normal"}],"ctas":null,"eventPageLumaEvent":null,"hasBackgroundImage":false,"showHostedBy":null,"slug":null,"theme":"lightTheme","title":"Protocol 26 releases"},{"_key":"0f3b0a92c7dd","_type":"oneColumnHtmlSection","backgroundImage":{"blur":false,"image":null,"scrim":false},"body":[{"_key":"29eee05fc7eb","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"f2e2e4d4bdf8","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"The following is a brief summary of what’s included in Protocol 26."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"9686268681bd","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"15ee9812264d","_type":"span","marks":["strong"],"text":"Freezing compromised ledger entries (CAP-0077)"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"h5"},{"_key":"3965342f4944","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"03e06059e31a","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Introduces protocol-level configuration settings that let validators, through consensus, maintain a list of frozen ledger keys. When a key is frozen, Soroban transactions that would touch it are rejected, and affected classic offers are pulled from the order book. An allow-list of explicitly permitted transactions can bypass the freeze when needed. This is a direct response to incidents and gives the network a consensus-driven, onchain tool to quarantine compromised entries without improvising."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"2c6d0272eaca","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"7cc33b8377a7","_type":"span","marks":["strong"],"text":"Checked 256-bit integer arithmetic (CAP-0082)"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"h5"},{"_key":"42a7dd8169bb","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"42d97a79f3a3","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Adds checked variants of 256-bit integer host functions (for both unsigned and signed types: add, subtract, multiply, and power) that return Void on overflow rather than trapping. Contracts can inspect the return value and handle overflow by design instead of crashing. Useful for financial logic involving large numbers."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"80e063abdb72","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"acdbaceafdf8","_type":"span","marks":["strong"],"text":"Precise TTL control (CAP-0078)"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"h5"},{"_key":"5ca6eb2dcd7f","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"f85504113b6e","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Introduces v2 TTL host functions with explicit extend_to, min_extension, and max_extension parameters. The host enforces network TTL limits and clamps or rejects extensions accordingly. Contracts can now tick state forward in precise increments, proportional to actual use, enabling equitable rent policies."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"a3289581a049","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"f3770157bd4b","_type":"span","marks":["strong"],"text":"Additional BN254 cryptographic host functions (CAP-0080)"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"h5"},{"_key":"6d612844cb54","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"8fa10a046301","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Builds on the BN254 work from X-Ray (Protocol 25). Adds nine new Soroban host functions: BN254 multi-scalar multiplication, scalar-field arithmetic (add, subtract, multiply, power, inverse), and curve-membership checks for both BLS12-381 and BN254 points. These move heavy ZK arithmetic into the host layer, making NoirLang proof verification significantly cheaper than Wasm-side implementations."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"1b1ae4a88498","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"8559f8ac350d","_type":"span","marks":["strong"],"text":"SAC improvements (CAP-0073)"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"h5"},{"_key":"d8ef87590d2a","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"a94d28fb0f15","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Lets the Stellar Asset Contract create unlimited trustlines for G-accounts directly, mirroring ChangeTrustOp semantics but driven from Soroban. Also updates XLM SAC transfers to auto-create account entries when sending enough XLM to a new G-address, reducing the need to mix classic operations into Soroban flows."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"a697a0ffd81e","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"2f63322b560a","_type":"span","marks":["strong"],"text":"Strkey conversion with muxed account support (CAP-0079)"}],"markDefs":[],"style":"h5"},{"_key":"0c4477ae86e1","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"3bf0c90382b0","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"Adds strkey conversion host functions with first-class support for muxed accounts, allowing contracts to convert between G…/M…/C… strkeys and Address/MuxedAddress objects natively. Cross-chain protocols that already speak strkeys can work with muxed accounts without writing custom encoding logic."}],"markDefs":[],"style":"normal"}],"ctas":null,"eventPageLumaEvent":null,"hasBackgroundImage":false,"showHostedBy":null,"slug":null,"theme":"lightTheme","title":"What’s New in Yardstick"},{"_key":"d062078319da","_type":"oneColumnHtmlSection","backgroundImage":{"blur":false,"image":null,"scrim":false},"body":[{"_key":"d81b09615e9d","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"0674f24dac5e","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"April 29, 2026: CAP descriptions published."}],"level":1,"listItem":"bullet","markDefs":[],"style":"normal"},{"_key":"a3a3318c7438","_type":"richText","children":[{"_key":"9a8cc836d0ab","_type":"span","marks":[],"text":"April 1, 2026: Initial draft <div class="oz-site-wrapper">
  

  <div class="container-fluid body-container body-container--home">
<div class="row-fluid-wrapper">

<div class="row-fluid-wrapper row-depth-1 row-number-1 dnd_area-row-0-force-full-width-section dnd-section dnd_area-row-0-padding">
<div class="row-fluid ">
<div class="span12 widget-span widget-type-cell dnd-column" style="" data-widget-type="cell" data-x="0" data-w="12">

<div class="row-fluid-wrapper row-depth-1 row-number-2 dnd-row">
<div class="row-fluid ">
<div class="span12 widget-span widget-type-custom_widget dnd-module" style="" data-widget-type="custom_widget" data-x="0" data-w="12">
<div id="hs_cos_wrapper_widget_1758889073083" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_module" style="" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="module"><section id="sub-navigation">
  <div class="container-nav">

<div class="row-fluid-wrapper row-depth-1 row-number-3 dnd_area-row-1-padding dnd-section dnd_area-row-1-force-full-width-section">
<div class="row-fluid ">
<div class="span12 widget-span widget-type-cell dnd-column" style="" data-widget-type="cell" data-x="0" data-w="12">

<div class="row-fluid-wrapper row-depth-1 row-number-4 dnd-row">
<div class="row-fluid ">
<div class="span12 widget-span widget-type-custom_widget dnd-module" style="" data-widget-type="custom_widget" data-x="0" data-w="12">
<div id="hs_cos_wrapper_widget_1758744680728" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_module" style="" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="module"><script src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/hub_generated/template_assets/1/196576322602/1777919003105/template_TextPlugin.min.js"></script>
<style>
  #hero .grid-glow-overlay.is-custom {
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) 1px, transparent 1px);
    z-index: 4;
  }
</style>
<section id="hero">
  <div class="announcement-spacer"></div>
  <div class="grid-background">
    <div class="grid-lines"></div>
    <div class="grid-glow-overlay is-gray" id="gridGlowOverlay"></div>
    <div class="grid-glow-overlay is-custom"></div>
    <div class="grid-glow-overlay is-white"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="container is-1200">
    <div class="hero-content">
      <div class="icons-container">
        <img class="base-icon" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/stellar-hero-square.svg" alt="Stellar" loading="eager">
        <img class="oz-icon" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/oz-iso-networks.svg" alt="OpenZeppelin" loading="eager">
      </div>
      <div class="content">
        <h1 class="main-title all-64">
          Build Securely on Stellar<br>
          with <span class="highlight">OpenZeppelin</span>
        </h1>
        <p class="description">
          OpenZeppelin brings its trusted smart contracts libraries and developer workflows to Stellar, a Rust-based blockchain. Developers can build payments, stablecoins, and DeFi apps on Stellar using familiar, audited building blocks.
        </p>
      </div>
      <div class="wrapper">
        <div class="ui-container">
          <div class="circle"></div>
          <div class="circle"></div>
          <div class="circle"></div>
        </div>
        <span id="text"></span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</section>
<script>
  // Grid glowing animation
  const heroContainer = document.getElementById('hero');
  const gridGlowOverlay = document.getElementById('gridGlowOverlay');

  document.body.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
    document.body.style.setProperty('--x', e.clientX + 'px');
    document.body.style.setProperty('--y', e.clientY + 'px');
  });

  heroContainer.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
    gridGlowOverlay.style.opacity = '1';
  });

  heroContainer.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    gridGlowOverlay.style.opacity = '0';
  });

  const baseIcon = document.querySelector('.base-icon');
  const ozIcon = document.querySelector('.oz-icon');
  const blueOverlay = document.querySelector('.grid-glow-overlay.is-custom');
  const whiteOverlay = document.querySelector('.grid-glow-overlay.is-white');

  if (baseIcon && blueOverlay) {
    baseIcon.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      blueOverlay.classList.add('show');
    });

    baseIcon.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      blueOverlay.classList.remove('show');
    });
  }

  if (ozIcon && whiteOverlay) {
    ozIcon.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      whiteOverlay.classList.add('show');
    });

    ozIcon.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      whiteOverlay.classList.remove('show');
    });
  }
  // Typewriter animation
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    gsap.registerPlugin(TextPlugin, ScrollTrigger);

    const rawHTML = `// Compatible with OpenZeppelin Stellar Soroban Contracts ^0.6.0<br>use stellar_tokens::{<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;fungible::{Base, FungibleToken},<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;vault::{FungibleVault, Vault},<br>};<br><br><br><br>
#[contractimpl]<br>
impl TokenizedVault {`;
    const lines = rawHTML
    .split(/<br\s*\/?>/i)  
    .map(line => line.trim())  
    .filter(line => line.length > 0);  

    const container = document.getElementById('text');

    const cursor = document.createElement('span');
    cursor.className = 'cursor';
    cursor.id = 'cursor';
    cursor.textContent = '|';

    const lineSpans = lines.map((_, index) => {
      const line = document.createElement('span');
      line.className = 'line';
      const textSpan = document.createElement('span');
      textSpan.className = 'line-text';
      textSpan.textContent = '';
      line.appendChild(textSpan);
      container.appendChild(line);

      if (index < lines.length - 1) {
        container.appendChild(document.createElement('br'));
      }

      return { line, textSpan };
    });

    if (lineSpans.length) {
      lineSpans[0].line.appendChild(cursor);
    } else {
      container.appendChild(cursor);
    }

    const charDuration = 0.0175; // half of 0.035
    const minLineDuration = 0.07; // half of 0.14
    const pauseAfterLine = 0.125; // half of 0.25
    const initialDelay = 0.3;

    const tl = gsap.timeline({ 
      delay: initialDelay,
      scrollTrigger: {
        trigger: "#hero",
        start: "bottom bottom", 
        toggleActions: "play none none none"
      }
    });

    lineSpans.forEach(({ line, textSpan }, idx) => {
      const textForLine = lines[idx];
      const dur = Math.max(minLineDuration, textForLine.length * charDuration);
      tl.to(textSpan, {
        duration: dur,
        ease: "none",
        text: { value: textForLine },
        onStart: () => {
          line.appendChild(cursor);
        },
        onUpdate: () => {
          if (cursor.previousSibling !== textSpan) {
            line.appendChild(cursor);
          }
        }
      });
      if (idx < lineSpans.length - 1) {
        tl.to({}, { duration: pauseAfterLine });
      }
    });

    tl.call(() => {
      const last = lineSpans[lineSpans.length - 1];
      if (last) last.line.appendChild(cursor);
    });
  });

</script></div>

</div><!--end widget-span -->
</div><!--end row-->
</div><!--end row-wrapper -->

</div><!--end widget-span -->
</div><!--end row-->
</div><!--end row-wrapper -->

<div class="row-fluid-wrapper row-depth-1 row-number-5 dnd_area-row-2-force-full-width-section dnd_area-row-2-padding dnd-section">
<div class="row-fluid ">
<div class="span12 widget-span widget-type-custom_widget dnd-module" style="" data-widget-type="custom_widget" data-x="0" data-w="12">
<div id="hs_cos_wrapper_widget_1761750564434" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_module" style="" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="module"><section id="contracts">
  <div class="container is-1200">
    <div class="leading-copy">
  <h2 class="heading-20">OpenZeppelin Stellar Contracts</h2>
      <p>A dedicated library of audited contracts and utilities for building on the Stellar blockchain. These standards make it easier to issue assets, launch stablecoins, and create DeFi applications that connect directly to Stellar’s global payment rails.</p>
      <a href="https://docs.openzeppelin.com/stellar-contracts/0.4.0/" class="arrowed-link" target="_blank">Docs →</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/OpenZeppelin/stellar-contracts" class="arrowed-link" target="_blank">Github →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="box-grid">
      <a href="https://wizard.openzeppelin.com/stellar" target="_blank" class="box-card contract-wizard">
        <div class="top-copy">
          <h4 class="heading-20">Contracts Wizard</h4>
          <p>Generate secure Stellar smart contracts quickly and safely. Configure modules, preview the Rust code, and integrate directly into your workflow.</p>
          <span class="arrowed-link">Try Wizard →</span>
        </div>

        <div class="image-wrapper">
          <img src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/wizard-stellar.webp" alt="Wizard">
        </div>
      </a>
      <a href="https://mcp.openzeppelin.com/" target="_blank" class="box-card contracts-mcp">
        <div class="top-copy">
          <h4 class="heading-20">Contracts MCP</h4>
          <p>Integrate OpenZeppelin Stellar smart contracts with AI-assisted workflows. Generate and deploy secure smart contracts using proven standards, guided by machine copilots.</p>
          <span class="arrowed-link">Try Contracts MCP →</span>
        </div>

        <div class="image-wrapper">
          <img class="first" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/mcp-stellar.svg" alt="MCP">
          <img class="second" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/mcp2-stellar.svg" alt="MCP">
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

</section></div>

</div><!--end widget-span -->
</div><!--end row-->
</div><!--end row-wrapper -->

<div class="row-fluid-wrapper row-depth-1 row-number-6 dnd-section dnd_area-row-3-padding dnd_area-row-3-force-full-width-section">
<div class="row-fluid ">
<div class="span12 widget-span widget-type-cell dnd-column" style="" data-widget-type="cell" data-x="0" data-w="12">

<div class="row-fluid-wrapper row-depth-1 row-number-7 dnd-row">
<div class="row-fluid ">
<div class="span12 widget-span widget-type-custom_widget dnd-module" style="" data-widget-type="custom_widget" data-x="0" data-w="12">
<div id="hs_cos_wrapper_widget_1761752274700" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_module" style="" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="module"><section id="steps">
  <div class="container is-1200">

    <div class="box-grid operate">
      <h2 class="heading-48">Open Source Tools</h2>
       <div class="box-card is-relayer">
        <div class="top-copy">
          <h4 class="heading-20">Relayer</h4>
          <p>Enable secure relaying for Stellar transactions. Anchors and apps can simplify backend operations and transaction flow management by using OpenZeppelin Relayer.</p>
          <a href="https://docs.openzeppelin.com/relayer" target="_blank" class="arrowed-link">Docs →</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/OpenZeppelin/openzeppelin-relayer" target="_blank" class="arrowed-link">Github →</a>
        </div>
        <div class="image-wrapper">
          <img loading="lazy" class="first" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/relayer-pop-dark.png" role="presentation">
          <img loading="lazy" class="second" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/IMAGE-STELLAR-RELAYER.png" role="presentation">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="box-card first is-monitor is-gray">
        <div class="top-copy">
          <h4 class="heading-20">Monitor</h4>
          <p>Track Stellar applications in real time. Detect anomalies, log events, and trigger automated responses to safeguard Stellar smart contracts and protect users.</p>
          <a href="https://docs.openzeppelin.com/monitor" target="_blank" class="arrowed-link">Docs →</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/OpenZeppelin/openzeppelin-monitor" target="_blank" class="arrowed-link">Github →</a>
        </div>
        <div class="image-wrapper">
          <div class="second">
            <div class="switch">
              <div class="switch-circle"></div>
            </div>
            <img loading="lazy" class="" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/track-pop-1.png" role="presentation">
          </div>
          <img loading="lazy" class="first" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/monitor-pop-dark.png" role="presentation">
        </div>
      </div>

     
    </div>
    <div class="box-grid operate">
      <a href="https://builder.openzeppelin.com" target="_blank" class="box-card fourth is-gray">
        <div class="top-copy">
          <h4 class="heading-20">UI Builder</h4>
          <p>Generate front-ends for Stellar contracts in seconds. Configure functions and export a complete React app to interact with deployed contracts.</p>
          <span class="arrowed-link">Try UI Builder →</span>
        </div>
        <div class="image-wrapper"> 
          <img class="first" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/IMG-STELLAR-UI.png" role="presentation">
          <img class="second" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/ui-builder-dark-pop.png" role="presentation">
        </div>
      </a>

      <a href="https://github.com/OpenZeppelin/soroban-security-detectors-sdk" target="_blank" class="box-card first company">
        <div class="top-copy">
          <h4 class="heading-20">Soroban Security Detectors SDK</h4>
          <p>Spot issues in Stellar contracts before they reach mainnet. This SDK enables developers to build custom static-analysis scanners and comes with prebuilt checks to catch common pitfalls early.</p>
          <span class="arrowed-link">Github →</span>
        </div>
        <div class="image-wrapper">
          <img loading="lazy" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/soroban-asset.svg" role="presentation" style="width:100%;transform:none!important;">
          <div class="scanner">
            <div class="before"></div>
            <div class="after"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="awards-row">
      <p>Enterprise-grade security and compliance for institutional adoption</p>
      <img loading="lazy" src="https://www.openzeppelin.com/hubfs/awards-row.svg" role="presentation">
    </div>
  </div>
</section></div>

    overflow: auto!important;
    background: linear-gradient(white, white) padding-box, linear-gradient(to right, #4E5DE48B, #5D628500) border-box!important;
    border: 1px solid transparent!important;
  }

  div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner {
    padding: 16px!important;
  }

  div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner p {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif!important;
    font-size: 12px!important;
    font-style: normal!important;
    font-weight: 400!important;
    line-height: 144%!important;
    max-width: 624px!important;
  }
  div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner button#hs-eu-cookie-settings-button {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif!important;
    font-size: 13px!important;
    line-height: 144%!important;
    color: #4F5EE5!important;
    font-weight: 400!important;
    text-shadow: none!important;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em!important;
  }
  div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner button#hs-eu-confirmation-button, div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner button#hs-eu-decline-button, 
  #hs-modal #hs-modal-content #hs-modal-footer #hs-modal-footer-container button#hs-modal-accept-all, #hs-modal #hs-modal-content #hs-modal-footer #hs-modal-footer-container button#hs-modal-save-settings  {
    padding: 5px 24px !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
    font-size: 14px !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    border-radius: 80px !important;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif !important;
    font-weight: 500 !important;
    font-size: 13px !important;
    line-height: 20px !important;
    color: white !important;
    text-shadow: none !important;
    letter-spacing: 0 !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;
    background: #4F56FA;
    border: 1px solid transparent !important;
    min-width: 100px;
    height: auto!important;
    margin: 0 5px !important;
    flex: auto!important;
  }
  div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner button#hs-eu-confirmation-button:hover, #hs-modal #hs-modal-content #hs-modal-footer #hs-modal-footer-container button#hs-modal-accept-all:hover {
    background: #4349D4 !important;
  }
  div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-buttons-area {
    margin: 0!important;
  }
  div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner button#hs-eu-decline-button, #hs-modal #hs-modal-content #hs-modal-footer #hs-modal-footer-container button#hs-modal-save-settings {
    border: 1px solid #EFEFEF!important;
    background: #FAFAFA!important;
    color: #0A0F39!important;
  }
  div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner button#hs-eu-decline-button:hover, #hs-modal #hs-modal-content #hs-modal-footer #hs-modal-footer-container button#hs-modal-save-settings:hover {
    background: #ededed !important;
  }
  #hs-eu-cookie-confirmation #hs-eu-opt-in-buttons {
    flex-grow: 1;
    align-items: center!important;
  }
  div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner div#hs-eu-policy-wording {
    margin-right: 0!important;
  }



  #hs-modal #hs-modal-content #hs-modal-header #hs-modal-header-container button#hs-modal-close-button {
    box-shadow: none!important;
  }
  #hs-modal #hs-modal-content #hs-modal-body #hs-modal-body-container #hs-modal-introduction {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif!important;
  }
  #hs-modal #hs-modal-content #hs-modal-body #hs-modal-body-container #hs-categories-container .hs-category-row .hs-category-row-header .hs-category-label {
    font-family: 'Inter',sans-serif!important;
  }
  #hs-modal #hs-modal-content a, #hs-modal #hs-modal-content p {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif!important;
  }


  @media (min-width: 751px){
    #hs-eu-cookie-confirmation {
      max-width: 656px!important;
    }

  }
  @media (max-width: 750px){
    div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner button#hs-eu-cookie-settings-button {
      font-size: 12px!important;
    }
    div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner button#hs-eu-confirmation-button {
      font-size: 12px!important;
      padding: 6px 14px!important;
      flex-basis: 33%;
    }

    div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner button#hs-eu-decline-button {
      font-size: 12px!important;
      padding: 6px 22px!important;
      flex-basis: 33%;

    }
    #hs-eu-cookie-confirmation {
      max-width: 100%!important;
      width: calc(100% - 30px)!important;
      margin-bottom: 10px!important;
    }
    div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner {
      padding-bottom: 16px!important;
    }
    div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner button#hs-eu-cookie-settings-button {
      padding-bottom: 8px!important;
      border-bottom: none!important;
    }
    div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-buttons-area {
      gap: 8px!important;
      border-bottom: none!important;
    }
    div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner p {
      font-size: 12px!important;
    }
    div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation div#hs-eu-cookie-confirmation-inner button#hs-eu-confirmation-button {
      margin: 0!important;
    }
  }
</style>


  
</body></html>

aria-label="Community"><h2 class="SkillsLanding__sectionTitle">Community skills</h2><p class="SkillsLanding__sectionDescription">Skills built and maintained by the Stellar community. Each project has its own install instructions, so follow the link on a card to set it up with your agent. The resources listed here are community-contributed and are not endorsed by the Stellar Foundation. Always do your own research (DYOR) before using any tool or resource. Inclusion in this list does not imply any warranty, security audit, or official recommendation.</p><div class="SkillsLanding__ecosystemGrid"><div class="Card Card--primary"><div class="SkillsCard"><div class="SkillsCard__header"><h3 class="SkillsCard__title">OpenZeppelin Contracts</h3><a href="https://github.com/OpenZeppelin/openzeppelin-skills/blob/main/skills/setup-stellar-contracts/SKILL.md" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="View OpenZeppelin Contracts source" class="SkillsCard__sourceLink"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" stroke="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M21 9L21 3M21 3H15M21 3L13 11M10 5H7.8C6.11984 5 5.27976 5 4.63803 5.32698C4.07354 5.6146 3.6146 6.07354 3.32698 6.63803C3 7.27976 3 8.11984 3 9.8V16.2C3 17.8802 3 18.7202 3.32698 19.362C3.6146 19.9265 4.07354 20.3854 4.63803 20.673C5.27976 21 6.11984 21 7.8 21H14.2C15.8802 21 16.7202 21 17.362 20.673C17.9265 20.3854 18.3854 19.9265 18.673 19.362C19 18.7202 19 17.8802 19 16.2V14" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></a></div><p class="SkillsCard__description">Scaffold a Soroban project with OpenZeppelin&#x27;s audited Stellar contract libraries. data-v-af4f7222><!--[--><!--]--><!--[--><h1 class="heading" data-v-af4f7222><span class="name clip" data-v-af4f7222>Stellar Wallets Kit</span><span class="text" data-v-af4f7222>All Stellar Wallets with just one library</span></h1><p class="tagline" data-v-af4f7222>Forget about reading the wallets' documentation, just support all of them at once with this kit.</p><!--]--><!--[--><!--]--><div class="VPLink no-icon VPFeature" data-v-6116eb0a data-v-8c18bcaf><!--[--><article class="box" data-v-8c18bcaf><!----><h2 class="title" data-v-8c18bcaf>Framework Agnostic</h2><p class="details" data-v-8c18bcaf>No matter if you're using React, Angular, Vue or even vanilla! Our library works everywhere (default modules).</p><!----></article><!--]--></div></div><div class="grid-3 item" data-v-6116eb0a><div class="VPLink no-icon VPFeature" data-v-6116eb0a data-v-8c18bcaf><!--[--><article class="box" data-v-8c18bcaf><!----><h2 class="title" data-v-8c18bcaf>Active Support</h2><p class="details" data-v-8c18bcaf>We are the same creators of xBull Wallet and other Stellar libraries, so we are constantly using and improving our own libraries.</p><!----></article><!--]--></div></div><div class="grid-3 item" data-v-6116eb0a><div class="VPLink no-icon VPFeature" data-v-6116eb0a data-v-8c18bcaf><!--[--><article class="box" data-v-8c18bcaf><!----><h2 class="title" data-v-8c18bcaf>Custom Themes</h2><p class="details" data-v-8c18bcaf>Define the theme of the kit's components so it feels just like your website, users probably won't know you are using a library ;)</p><!----></article><!--]--></div></div><!--]--></div></div></div><!--[--><!--]--><div class="vp-doc container" style="" data-v-383742a8 data-v-8db70f2d><!--[--><div style="position:relative;" data-v-383742a8><div><h2 id="getting-started" tabindex="-1">Getting started <a class="header-anchor" href="#getting-started" aria-label="Permalink to “Getting started”">​</a></h2><p>You can use our library and interact with wallets in multiple ways, here is the shortest way but depending on the logic of you app you might need to do something different, check the documentation for more details.</p><p>Here are the steps to install, start and sign a transaction with our kit:</p><h3 id="install-the-package" tabindex="-1">Install the package <a class="header-anchor" href="#install-the-package" aria-label="Permalink to “Install the package”">​</a></h3><div class="language-shell"><button title="Copy Code" class="copy"></button><span class="lang">shell</span><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" add</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF;"> @creit-tech/stellar-wallets-kit</span></span></code></pre></div><h3 id="start-the-kit" tabindex="-1">Start the kit <a class="header-anchor" href="#start-the-kit" aria-label="Permalink to “Start the kit”">​</a></h3><div class="language-typescript"><button title="Copy Code" class="copy"></button><span class="lang">typescript</span><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e;" tabindex="0" <span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8;">  networkPassphrase: Networks.</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF;">PUBLIC</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8;">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8;">  address,</span></span>

Maybe listening to updates from the kit or manually handling the connection yourself? Check the <a href="/installation.html">documentation</a> for more details.</p><h2 id="compatible-wallets" tabindex="-1">Compatible Wallets: <a class="header-anchor" href="#compatible-wallets" aria-label="Permalink to “Compatible Wallets:”">​</a></h2><ul><li>xBull Wallet (Both PWA and extension version)</li><li>Albedo</li><li>Freighter</li><li>Rabet (extension version)</li><li>WalletConnect</li><li>Lobstr</li><li>Hana</li><li>Hot Wallet</li><li>Klever Wallet</li></ul><h2 id="who-is-using-the-kit" tabindex="-1">Who is using the kit? <a class="header-anchor" href="#who-is-using-the-kit" aria-label="Permalink to “Who is using the kit?”">​</a></h2><p>If you would like to see the kit in action, check these websites that are already using it:</p><ul><li><a href="https://lab.stellar.org/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">https://lab.stellar.org/</a></li><li><a href="https://swap.xbull.app/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">https://swap.xbull.app/</a></li><li><a href="https://mainnet.blend.capital/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">https://mainnet.blend.capital/</a></li><li><a href="https://app.fxdao.io/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">https://app.fxdao.io/</a></li><li><a href="https://app.sorobandomains.org/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">https://app.sorobandomains.org/</a></li></ul></div></div><!--]--></div></div></div><!----><!--[--><!--]--></div></div>
